highlights.summary:
WBJEE 2026 registration has begun for Pailan College of Management and Technology - PCMT admission to the BE/BTech course. Students can register till Apr 5, 2026, for the exam scheduled for May 24, 2026.

A few more updates are given below:

faqs.question: How can I get into Pailan College of Management and Technology - PCMT for UG/PG courses? Am I eligible for admission?
faqs.answer:
Pailan College of Management and Technology - PCMT has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:
Courses Eligibility
B.E. / B.Tech Candidate must have passed Diploma in Engineering/Technology from a recognised college with a minimum of 45% marks (40% marks for SC/ST/OBC-A/OBC-B/PWD) or equivalent CGPA Or Candidate must have completed B.Sc. from a recognised college with a minimum of 45% marks (40% marks for SC/ST/OBC-A/OBC-B/PWD) or equivalent CGPA. For B.Sc candidate the upper age limit is 27 years as on 31.12.2017 (There is no upper age limit for Diploma holders in Engineering/Technology).
BBA Candidate must have completed 10+2 from a recognied baord.
BCA Candidate must have completed 10+2 from a recognied baord.
B.Sc. Candidate must have completed 10+2 from a recognied baord.
BHM Candidate must have completed 10+2 from a recognied baord.
BOPTM Candidate must have completed 10+2 from a recognied baord.
BHMTT Candidate must have completed 10+2 from a recognied baord.
MBA/PGDM Candidate must have comepleted Minimum Bachelor Degree with (10+2+3) or (10+2+4) in any discipline from any University recognised by AICTE or UGC. Final year undergraduate students can also apply.

faqs.question: What is the last date for Pailan College of Management and Technology admission 2025?
faqs.answer: The application deadline at Pailan College of Management and Technology is always found on their official website. People usually enroll in UG courses between the months of June and July. Look at the official website often to get new updates. Applications made after the deadline might not be admitted.

faqs.question: Can I get admission at Pailan College of Management and Technology without an entrance exam?
faqs.answer: Admission to BBA and BCA at Pailan College of Management and Technology is given depending on merit. You do not have to take an entrance exam for these courses as long as you are qualified. You must have MAT or WBJEE mark to apply for MBA and BTech. You cannot receive direct admission for these programmes.

college_info.intro: The flagship programmes offered at Pailan College of Management and Technology are BTech and MBA. The college offers these programmes to students at the UG and PG levels. Further, the college offers these programmes for a duration of 4 and 2 years, respectively with a comprehensive curriculum. PCMT Kolkata courses strive to enhance the learning experience of students in order to prepare them for the industry. Candidates can check the popular programmes offered at Pailam College of Management and Technology in the table provided below:

placements.overview:
WBJEE 2026 registration has begun for Pailan College of Management and Technology - PCMT admission to the BE/BTech course. Students can register till Apr 5, 2026, for the exam scheduled for May 24, 2026.

Pailan College of Management and Technology is also known as PCMT and was established in 2003. It is a private college and is located in Kolkata, West Bengal. The college is approved by the AICTE and is affiliated with the Maulana Abul Kalam Azad University of Technology, West Bengal. It is one of the renowned colleges in Kolkata to offer quality education to students in the field of Engineering and Management.

Pailan College of Management and Technology courses are offered to students at the UG and PG levels. Some of the popular programmes offered at the college are BTech, BOPTM, BBA, BCA, BSc, and MBA. These courses are offered to students in full-time mode across several specialisations. Further, the college has a panel of guest lecturers to inspire students in their respective careers and to give them tips and invaluable insights in every course.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Pailan College of Management and Technology offers a wide range of programmes to students at the UG and PG levels. The college is mainly concerned with streams such as Engineering, Management, Computer Applications, Science, etc. At the UG level, the college offers various courses such as BTech, BOPTM, BBA, BCA, BSc, and BHMTT. These courses are generally offered to students for a duration of 3 years.

faqs.answer: A:    In order to study BSc at Pailan College of Management and Technology, students must have successfully completed their Class 12 classes. Those selected will be those with valid scores from CBSE or WBCHSE. Academic performance is checked by the college to choose individuals for consideration. Only people who are qualified can apply.
faqs.question: What is the eligibility for BSc at Pailan College of Management and Technology?

faqs.answer: A:    The overall seats available across all courses offered by Pailan College of Management and Technology - PCMT is up to 538. Good thing to know is that Pailan College of Management and Technology - PCMT has courses which are approved by prominent Government bodies like AICTE.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Excellent campus and great support.

review_content.Placements: I am a second-year BBA student. Our college has an IIC and TPO cell. They help and guide us for a cracking interview. I have asked my seniors, and they have said that they have got internships. Students receive excellent opportunities to connect with reputed companies, secure internships, and achieve strong job offers that set the foundation for bright and successful careers.
review_content.Infrastructure: The campus has clean classrooms, good Wi-Fi, computer labs, a library filled with valuable books and resources, an infirmary, sports, etc. The entire infrastructure is designed to create a positive learning and living environment for students. The hostel is well-maintained.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: All in all, it is a very good college to join with a very big campus and facilities.

review_content.Placements: Our college has a TPO and IIC cell, which provides us with several types of placements and internships for all of the students. I asked my seniors about the placements, and they responded very positively that various companies have come to our college to take students for their company.
review_content.Infrastructure: I personally do not stay in hostels, but many of my friends stay in hostels, and they say it is very comfortable. Also, the infrastructure is very homely as there are ACs in classrooms, Wi-fi available, and we have two to three libraries with various books for students.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Excellent faculty and strong placements for BBA students.

review_content.Placements: Our college provides excellent placement opportunities for BBA students. Around 80%-90% of students from our batch got successfully placed in reputed companies. Top recruiting companies like Wipro, Infosys, TCS, and HDFC Bank. Students are offered roles like HR and marketing.
review_content.Infrastructure: I do not stay in a hostel, but students have mentioned that the hostel facilities are good, with proper food quality and hygiene maintained in the mess. It provides free Wi-Fi, air-conditioned classrooms, clean classrooms, and air-conditioned libraries.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Satisfied with faculty, courses, facilities, and connectivity. However, events are uncommon.

review_content.Placements: About 40% of them are placed, the rest went on to find their own jobs owing to the skill sets they developed. The highest package offered is 4.5– 4.8 LPA. Recruiting companies are Techno Exponent, TCS, Globsyn, etc. Some of the major roles offered are data analyst, data entry officer, UI/UX designer, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: Multiple working Wi-Fi channels are available around the institute. Labs are well-maintained with capable machines. Classrooms are decently big, although some of them lack air-conditioning or have poorly maintained ACs. The library has a commendable collection of books; however, requisitions for any required book are entertained.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: It has good infrastructure and helpful faculty members.

review_content.Placements: Placements at our college are satisfactory, and reputed companies visit the college each year. Many students secure jobs in the core and IT sectors. The training and support provided are helpful, though opportunities vary by branch. We are trained to face interviews.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college has clean classrooms, common rooms for students to relax, and hygienic washrooms. Sports competitions happen every year. There is a huge library and a computer lab with high-speed internet. There are AC classrooms with whiteboards. The food quality could be improved a bit. Four groups are divided into sports.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely satisfied and campus life is excellent.

review_content.Placements: Placements are good, with 80% of students getting placed. Teachers are helpful in preparing us for the recruitment process. Top companies recruit from our campus. The average package is 6 LPA, and the highest is 120 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: The course infrastructure is decent. We have good labs and classrooms with AC. But the toilets are dirty of the college. Hostel facilities are average, with satisfactory food in the mess. Hostel has gym and playground for playing football and cricket. We have study room and recreation room.

overview_faqs.question: Is it worth to consider Pailan College of Management and Technology - PCMT as a good Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: Pailan College of Management and Technology - PCMT is a reputed institute for B.Tech, BBA, BCA, B.Sc., BHM, BOPTM, BHMTT, MBA/PGDM. Students can opt these programs to pursue their career in Engineering, Business & Management Studies, IT & Software, Mass Communication & Media, Hospitality & Travel, Medicine & Health Sciences. Institute has trained & experienced faculty who deliver these programs. As per Shiksha verified reviews, Pailan College of Management and Technology - PCMT has a rating of 3.2 on the basis of reviews by students. Not just this, it has also been rated 3.4 on campuslife, 2.6 on placements, 3.5 on faculty and 3.6 on Infrastructure.

admission_overview.college_name: Pailan College of Management and Technology Admission 2025: Fees, Courses, Eligibility and Selection

admission_overview.title: Pailan College of Management and Technology Admission Overview 2025
admission_overview.description: Pailan College of Management and Technology admission to all its courses is entrance-based. The institute offers UG courses in the stream of Technology and Management, which are offered in affiliation with the Maulana Abul Kalam Azad University of Technology. These are BBA (General), BBA in Business Analytics and BCA. Pailan College of Management and Technology - PCMT is affiliated to Maulana Abul Kalam Azad University of Technology MAKAUT accepts state-level and national-level entrance exams to shortlist candidates for final admission. Those who qualify for the entrance examination can then register on the Pailan College of Management and Technology registration portal for seat allocation. Pailan College of Management and Technology offers UG courses in the disciplines of Technology and Management. Admission to all these courses at Pailan College of Management and Technology is done through a Common Entrance Test, i.e., MAKAUT CET. Candidates must also fulfil the minimum eligibility requirements of the respective courses. Check out the table below for admission highlights of Pailan College of Management and Technology:

eligibility_selection.title: Pailan College of Management and Technology Eligibility & Selection 2025
eligibility_selection.description: Pailan College of Management and Technology offers entrance-based admission to all its courses. Admission to BBA and BCA courses is open and is based on merit. Candidates who meet the minimum eligibility criteria for the respective course will have to appear for the entrance exam for admission to the BCA and BBA courses. The following table mentions the eligibility and selection for Pailan College of Management and Technology courses :

courses_table.eligibility: Graduation in any stream from a recognised board with a minimum of 50% marks
Class 12 with 45% in Physics, Chemistry & Maths.

faqs.answer: Yes, you are eligible to apply to Pailan College of Management and Technology if you have 60% in your Class 12 result. To study BBA or BCA, you only need to get 45% in Class 12. The way you are chosen for a course still relies on your entrance standings. Meet the deadline by applying in time.
faqs.question: Can I take admission in Pailan College of Management and Technology with 60% in Class 12?

admission_process.title: Pailan College of Management and Technology  Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Pailan College of Management and Technology conducts various rounds to shortlist candidates for MBA & BTech courses. Admission to Pailan College of Management and Technology is a multi-step process. Check below the step-wise Pailan College of Management and Technology admission process:
Step 1: Pailan College of Management and Technology Application Process 2025

To get the application login credentials, candidates will have to submit the registration fee through the official website of Pailan College of Management and Technology. Candidates need to apply online on the official website of the university.
Step 2: Pailan College of Management and Technology Selection Process 2025

Admission to BBA & BCA courses is entrance-based. The institute has a predefined selection process for shortlisting aspirants. Pailan College of Management and Technology accepts a valid score of MAT, JEMAT, CAT, WBJEE and WBJEE, which is conducted at an all-India level examination. The selection process includes an entrance exam, shortlisting of candidates & final admission.
Step 3: Pailan College of Management and Technology Counselling & Admission Confirmation

After completion of the selection rounds, candidates need to come for counselling and document verification. Selected candidates need to pay aPailan College of Management and Technology course feeto confirm their admission.

faqs.answer: BTech admission at Pailan College of Management and Technology is offered based on your merit.The academic record or scores from important entrance exams such as WBJEE and JEE Main, help to evaluate students.Those who are qualified can access the online platform for application.Before final admission, a student must undergo counselling and show their essential documents.

faqs.question: How are students selected for BSc at Pailan College of Management and Technology?
faqs.answer: Students are admitted to the B.Sc. course at Pailan College of Management and Technology by looking at their Class 12 marks.One must score sufficiently in the CBSE 12th or WBCHSE board exams to be eligible.Applicants who match the required cutoff and criteria are given consideration for admission.You don't have to take an entrance test to be selected.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission at Pailan College of Management and Technology?
faqs.answer: Direct admission is not provided by Pailan College of Management and Technology for any course.Students are admitted to courses after tests or based on their marks depending on the course.Anyone interested in the programme must check if they are eligible and go through the selection process.You should also expect to have counseling and verification of your documents.

faqs.question: Does Pailan College of Management and Technology accept admission through MAT?
faqs.answer: It is possible to use MAT scores as part of your application for MBA at Pailan College of Management and Technology.To be eligible, people must have graduated with at least 50% and appear in either the MAT or the JEMAT test.Those who have been shortlisted are required to attend counselling and verify their seats.The number of available seats is not large which is why you should apply early.

faqs.question: Can I get admission at Pailan College of Management and Technology without an entrance exam?
faqs.answer: Admission to BBA and BCA at Pailan College of Management and Technology is given depending on merit.You do not have to take an entrance exam for these courses as long as you are qualified.You must have MAT or WBJEE mark to apply for MBA and BTech.You cannot receive direct admission for these programmes.

The JEE Main cutoff 2024 was released for the General, OBC, ST, SC, EWS, and PWD categories in the AI quota. The closing cutoff for the same stood at 580842 in 2023.

labs.description: Available Facilities: Civil Engineering Lab, Chemistry Lab, Computer Lab, Electrical Lab, Electronics Lab, Physics Lab, Analog & Digital Electronics Lab, Basic Electrical & Electronic Engg Lab, Control System Lab, Database Management System Lab, Digital Communication Lab, Object Oriented Programming Lab, Electrical Drives Lab, Electrical Machine Design Lab, Engineering Graphics /Drawing Lab, Microprocessor & Microcontroller Lab, Power Electronics Lab, Multimedia Lab, Embedded Lab, Transducer & Sensor Lab, Analog Electronic Circuit Lab, Strength of Materials Lab, Soil Mechanics Lab, Fluid Mechanics Lab, Analog Communication Lab, Data Structure Lab

reviews.review_heading: Excellent campus and great support.
reviews.review_text: The campus has clean classrooms, good Wi-Fi, computer labs, a library filled with valuable books and resources, an infirmary, sports, etc. The entire infrastructure is designed to create a positive learning and living environment for students. The hostel is well-maintained.

reviews.review_heading: All in all, it is a very good college to join with a very big campus and facilities.
reviews.review_text: I personally do not stay in hostels, but many of my friends stay in hostels, and they say it is very comfortable. Also, the infrastructure is very homely as there are ACs in classrooms, Wi-fi available, and we have two to three libraries with various books for students.

reviews.review_heading: Excellent faculty and strong placements for BBA students.
reviews.review_text: I do not stay in a hostel, but students have mentioned that the hostel facilities are good, with proper food quality and hygiene maintained in the mess. It provides free Wi-Fi, air-conditioned classrooms, clean classrooms, and air-conditioned libraries.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with faculty, courses, facilities, and connectivity. However, events are uncommon.
reviews.review_text: Multiple working Wi-Fi channels are available around the institute. Labs are well-maintained with capable machines. Classrooms are decently big, although some of them lack air-conditioning or have poorly maintained ACs. The library has a commendable collection of books; however, requisitions for any required book are entertained.

reviews.review_heading: It has good infrastructure and helpful faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Our college has clean classrooms, common rooms for students to relax, and hygienic washrooms. Sports competitions happen every year. There is a huge library and a computer lab with high-speed internet. There are AC classrooms with whiteboards. The food quality could be improved a bit. Four groups are divided into sports.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied and campus life is excellent.
reviews.review_text: The course infrastructure is decent. We have good labs and classrooms with AC. But the toilets are dirty of the college. Hostel facilities are average, with satisfactory food in the mess. Hostel has gym and playground for playing football and cricket. We have study room and recreation room.

reviews.review_heading: PCMT College has strong academics with growing infrastructure and industry exposure.
reviews.review_text: A large central library plus 2-3 division libraries. Well-equipped laboratories, including computer labs & a full Wi-Fi campus. Separate boys' and girls' hostels are available with comfortable rooms including a chair, table, and bed. The food quality is decent, and this college has good medical facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Fully satisfied with our course.
reviews.review_text: The college has excellent lab facilities, a good library, an enabled campus, and a good sports ground. No canteen facilities are available right now, but they may open soon. Hostel facilities are also available for outstation students at a very minimal cost. Overall, it is good.

reviews.review_heading: Strong clinical exposure, supportive faculty & vibrant campus life, but Scope for better equipment.
reviews.review_text: Faculty are good, helpful, understanding, and of average qualified. They can make future optometrists well-educated. Semesters are not too hard if we study well. 70% students pass the exam in each semester, but some students are not able to pass.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, good at average levels.
reviews.review_text: It has average college interior, not to much attractive but looks overall good. Wi-Fi is also available but poor connection level. Labs are clean and quite good. Classrooms are good but AC is not working well. There is a library but books are too poor condition and lack of books in the library.

reviews.review_heading: College is good in average condition.
reviews.review_text: It has average college interior, not to much attractive but looks overall good. Wi-Fi is also available but poor connection level. Labs are clean and quite good. Classrooms are good but AC is not working well. There is a library but books are too poor condition and lack of books in the library.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, the experience is good.
reviews.review_text: There are 2 computer labs with 20 & 30 desktops, and CCTV surveillance in entrances & classrooms also where students give exams. Few of my friends are staying in a hostel, & they said the rooms are good, & the food of the canteen is average as compared to price.

reviews.review_heading: College is good but the hostel facility is not good enough .
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good, but the hostel is not. The hostel is moderate. There is no mess for food; you should go to the market and buy some food for yourself. The college provides medical facilities and has its own ambulance. The principal of the college also provides inspiration for sports and cultural functions.

reviews.review_heading: Navigating Mediocrity: A candid review of Pailan college of management and technology.
reviews.review_text: All classrooms have AC and the whole campus has free Wi-Fi. But the buildings have been under development for a long time. PCMT is not very big, like other colleges in West Bengal, with the same fee. There is better infrastructure at other colleges at the same price.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is not bad, it is an average college in every aspect.
reviews.review_text: Better infrastructure , like free Wi-Fi, AC Classrooms, free library and each day you can take your subject related book from our library . Very co - operative teachers are here for library. Hostel facility, mess and canteen is also good. There are different hostel present for boys and girls.

faqs.question: What is the application fee for the M.Tech programme at APJ Abdul Kalam Technological University?
faqs.answer: The utility charge for the M.Tech application at APJ Abdul Kalam Technological University (KTU) varies based totally on the class of the applicant: For widespread category students, the software charge is Rs 1,000/-. For reserved category college students, the utility fee is Rs 500/-. The software charge has to be paid online for the duration of the submission method. It is essential to word that this price is non-refundable in any situation. Selected applicants who're presented admission need to pay the course charge either at the university or through online channels. The direction price for the M.Tech. Program at KTU isn't always constant and can vary depending on the specialization selected by using the pupil. Applicants need to test the respectable internet site of the university for up-to-date statistics on expenses and fee methods.

overview_faqs.answer: Yes, APJ Abdul Kalam Technological University (KTU) is a recognised institution with the following points of recognition:Official recognition by the University Grants Commission (UGC) of India.Approval by the All India Council for Technical Education (AICTE).Affiliation with over 170 colleges in Kerala.Recognition by the Association of Indian Universities (AIU).Ranking among the top 600 universities in India by uniRank.Ranking 539th in India and 9013th in the world by EduRank.Ranking 28th out of 30 colleges in India for Architecture according to IIRF.

review_summary.college_name: KTU Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: This is a good college compared to near self-financing colleges in Palakkad.

content.Placements: In my college, nearby Al Ameen Law College is also there. Many other state students are also studying there. The strength of the law college is much more than Al Ameen Engineering College. There are engineering fields like ECE, EEE, MECH, CIVIL And also AD and CSE are here. Cybersecurity has been newly started this year.
content.Infrastructure: I'm a hostel student. My home is in Malappuram. At the hostel, we have non-veg food daily, as lunch and on Sunday, only veg food. It is not bad. Hygienic food, then for a monthly fee is nearly Rs. 5000. Transportation through Pattambi, Manarkkad and Palakkad.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Here in my college, both career and college life are awesome. I really loved it here.

content.Placements: In my college, the CSE and AI departments are top-ranked courses that are in high demand. Also, for CORE branches, they have been working from 2003 onwards with experienced staff. Newly started Cybersecurity, BBA, and BCA programs are also working well. Our college placements are conducted in the final year. Recruiting companies are Wipro, TCS, etc.
content.Infrastructure: About the infrastructure in my college, the hostel and canteen are neat and well-maintained. A food inspection from FSSAI was conducted a few months ago in my college. Due to these factors, the college canteen and hostel food is not bad. My college has held 8 Wi-Fi facilitated computer labs, and many entrance exams like JEE, KEAM, etc., are held in my college because of the many computer labs.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Really nice college if you are looking for placements.

content.Placements: About 80-85 percent of students are placed, and in the Computer Science branch about 95 percent of students are placed. Top recruiting companies like Google, Intel, etc., taking students from this college, which has branches like Electronics and Communication, Computer Science, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The college has free Wi-Fi, a library, an Idea Lab, and a canteen which is nice, along with football, basketball, volleyball, etc. Teams, MEC has an Idea Lab where we can do our own projects and assignments, and in addition, we have Fab Lab facilities too.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: The reality of MS College of Engineering, Kuttipuram.

content.Placements: The placement depends upon your skills. Compared to other colleges, we have high placement, and the college has a separate cell for placement. In my course placement rate, I can't tell because there are no passed out student because the course started only 2 years ago, and I have heard the students get placed in companies like Tata and all.
content.Infrastructure: About infrastructure, it is quite good, we have a nice library, labs, auditorium. The classes have quite good infrastructure. We have Wi-Fi in labs and separate Wi-Fi for normal usage in college, on phones, but we pay for it in 1st year, and canteens are quite okay.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Overall a good college with a nice atmosphere.

content.Placements: Our college has an average placement rate now. The average package is around 4 LP. Amazon, IBM, Infosys, TCS etc companies came to our college and recruited students. The students go to internships in various companies, which are good companies. Overall a nice placement rate.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has good labs for each department, and the classrooms are good having projectors and a good atmosphere. We have two libraries digital and non digital. They are so good that they have Wi-Fi support in every lab. We have very good sports and games availability.

admission_overview.college_name: KTU Admission 2025: Fee, Dates, Eligibility, Application

paragraphs: KTU- APJ Abdul Kalam Technological University admission 2025is entrance-based for all the courses. The application forms are available on the university's official website. The APJ Abdul Kalam Technological University offers a list of courses at the undergraduate, postgraduate and doctoral levels. The flagship programme of KTU is BTech which is offered in various different specialisations. Admission to Bachelor of Technology (BTech) is granted based on JEE Mains followed by further admission rounds. Furthermore, MTech, MSc and MDes programmes are offered byKTUthrough the scores of other entrance exams such as GATE.
Candidates must check the eligibility of the course they wish to apply to prior to filling out the application form.

KTU admission 2025begins with the application process of the accepted entrance exams. BTech is the most popular course of this institute, which is offered along with various excellent programmes. KTU admission criteria differ from one course to another. The courses are offered in a regular/offline mode and candidates can learn more about theKTU coursesthrough the highlights table given below:
Particulars
KTU Admission Highlights 2025
Mode of study
Regular/ Full-Time
Programmes Offered
20+ courses across multiple specialisations
Level of programmes offered
Undergraduate, Postgraduate, Certificate & Doctoral-level courses
Popular programmes
BTech | MTech| MBA
How to apply?
https://www.pgadmission.ktu.edu.in/
NOTE:The above-mentioned course fee is as per the official website/sanctioning body. It is subject to changes and hence, is indicative.

The eligibility criteria for all the courses is set by the university to maintain the merit and competence of the students that get admission to the courses. Candidates wishing to get admission to their desired course must meet the eligibility criteria and go through the selection process that is set out by the university. Check out the eligibility and selection criteria of the courses through the table given below:
Class 12 from a recognised board with a minimum 50% aggregate
Bachelor’s degree or equivalent with a minimum 50% aggregate
BE/ BTech/ MSc or equivalent with a minimum 50% aggregate
Candidates from the Science Stream with Physics,Chemistryand Mathematics as subjects
BE/ BTech/ BDes/ BArch or equivalent degree with a minimum 60% aggregate
NOTE:The above-mentioned course fee is as per the official website/sanctioning body. It is subject to changes and hence, is indicative.

The fee structure is a combination of various components that include refundable and non refundable units. Candidates can check out the total seat intake and the course fee that is mentioned on the table given below:
NOTE:The above-mentioned seat intake and fees for the courses is as per the official website/sanctioning body. It is subject to changes and hence, is indicative.

Candidates applying for KTU courses must ensure that they are meeting the above-mentioned eligibility criteria. The institute has a multi-step admission process that students must follow to get into the institute. The admission procedure involves registration, entrance exam, shortlisting, release of merit list, counselling, and admission confirmation. Mentioned below in detail is how to get admission to Indian Institute of Technology Delhi:
Step 1: KTU Application Process 2025

Candidates seeking admission at KTU are required to complete the application form for the entrance exam that is required. For example, for BTech, candidates are required to apply for KEAM application and for MBA candidates can apply for CMAT.
Step 2: KTU Selection Criteria

After the conclusion of the application process, students are required to take the course-specific entrance exam followed by other selection rounds (if applicable). After which, counselling rounds are carried out for some of the programmes for the seat allotment process. Candidates must appear for the additional rounds of admission after the entrance exam if required.
Step 3: Admission Confirmation
Candidates selected after all the selection rounds can confirm their admission/seat by paying the required amount ofKTU fee.

placement_data.title: KTU Placement Overview
paragraphs: KTU University has not released the final placement report for the year 2022. According to the media report, a total of 90 students got placed during APJ Abdul Kalam Technological University placement in 2022 for engineering students of the affiliated college. The highest CTC offered was INR 3.50 LPA, in addition to the first-year retention bonus of INR 1 LPA.

faqs.question: How many students got placed during the APJ Abdul Kalam Technological University placement drive 2022?
faqs.answer: KTU University has not released the final placement report for the year 2022. According to the media report, a total of 90 students got placed during APJ Abdul Kalam Technological University placement drive of 2022.

faqs.question: What was the highest package offered during KTU placement drive of 2022?
faqs.answer: KTU University has not released the final placement report for the year 2022. According to the media report, the highest CTC offered to the Engineering students was INR 3.50 LPA, in addition to the first-year retention bonus of INR 1 LPA.

faqs.question: How many companies participated in APJ Abdul Kalam Technological University placements 2023?
faqs.answer: The Central Training and Placement Cell (CTPC) is in charge of AKTU placements. It collaborated with Gainsight Software Pvt Ltd. to host a female-only on-campus placement drive. Out of the 22 female students who were shortlisted, 14 were given the opportunity to accept a pay package worth Rs 15 Lakhs annually. So far, the university has conducted more than 26 placement drives, some of which were held on campus. The placement cell and team at AKTU successfully placed over 10,984 students in prominent businesses like Wipro, Capgemini, Accenture, Cognizant, and many more. Not exactly a number but many companies are participated in placements2023.

reviews.review_heading: It is an eco-friendly college with all the needed things.
reviews.review_text: Our college should provide well-maintained smart classrooms, wide labs with all equipment, and a library with lots of books. The college provides separate hostels for both men and women. A canteen should be provided on the campus. A large ground should also be available for sports.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by TIST - Toc H Institute of Science & TechnologyReviewed on 15 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: College offers a good campus life.
reviews.review_text: The college has a very good infrastructure. All classrooms are properly vented and kept tidy. There are 3 libraries in total in each block. College has separate hostels for boys and girls inside the campus itself, and the food and accommodation in the hostel are well settled.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by TIST - Toc H Institute of Science & TechnologyReviewed on 15 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Supportive teaching and good placement training.
reviews.review_text: The campus is spacious and well-maintained. Classrooms have projectors and boards. The laboratories are equipped with many systems for practical learning. The library has a good collection of textbooks and reference books. Computer labs have proper internet access and updated software.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Government Engineering College, KozhikodeReviewed on 14 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: The college is average and strict compared to other government colleges. It has good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Overall, the infrastructure is quite good, even though our college is quite small compared to other government colleges in Kerala. Facilities are good. Ladies' hostels are good compared to other hostels. It is clean, and the food is also good. Sports are also quite nice.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by TIST - Toc H Institute of Science & TechnologyReviewed on 12 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: TIST Arakkunnam: An honest review from a fresher.
reviews.review_text: TIST has a green, open campus that offers a quiet place to study. The labs are well equipped, and the large library is a really useful resource for students. Overall, the infrastructure is practical and simple, making it a good spot to focus on coursework.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by TIST - Toc H Institute of Science & TechnologyReviewed on 12 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Good placements in the past couple of years in our college.
reviews.review_text: Overall, the infrastructure is satisfactory. Wi-Fi often seems to be slow, especially in the basement-level labs. Classrooms and libraries are well maintained. All necessary resources are provided in the library. Regarding sports, necessary training and coaching are provided for students in football, kho-kho, etc., for both boys and girls. The food in the canteen is healthy, budget-friendly, and satisfactory.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Mohandas College of Engineering and TechnologyReviewed on 12 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: One of the best Privately owned college in Trivandrum.
reviews.review_text: The college hostel food  got many complaints a few months before and now its okay. Now they are providing good food and snacks for the students, which happens once in a blue moon. Anyway, we can rate it almost 4 out of 5 but I am not a hosteler.

college_info.college_name: KTU Scholarship Details

paragraphs: The utility charge for the M.Tech application at APJ Abdul Kalam Technological University (KTU) varies based totally on the class of the applicant: For widespread category students, the software charge is Rs 1,000/-. For reserved category college students, the utility fee is Rs 500/-. The software charge has to be paid online for the duration of the submission method. It is essential to word that this price is non-refundable in any situation. Selected applicants who're presented admission need to pay the course charge either at the university or through online channels. The direction price for the M.Tech. Program at KTU isn't always constant and can vary depending on the specialization selected by using the pupil. Applicants need to test the respectable internet site of the university for up-to-date statistics on expenses and fee methods.

Depending on the particular programme, PG course costs at APJ Abdul Kalam Technological University (AKTU) change. Here are some specifics: B.Tech: One of AKTU's most well-liked programmes, the B.Tech programme offers 41 distinct specialisations. M.Tech: The official fee schedule for the M.Tech programme for the academic year 2024–2025 has not yet been disclosed. But for the duration of the course, it usually ranges from INR 0.5 Lakhs to INR 5 lakhs. PhD: AKTU's Ph.D. programme fees are also subject to change.For the particular price schedule in 2024–2025. In addition you can check the official website.

The course fees for four years BPharma in KTU - APJ Abdul Kalam Technological University might be around INR 2 lakh. However, the course fee vary across the affiliated college offering BPharma course.

APJ Abdul Kalam Technological University (AKTU) and its affiliated colleges charge different tuition for their MBA programmes. Unofficial sources claim that the price ranges from INR 70,000 to INR 6.5 Lacs. Remember that these are approximations and could change depending on particular institutions and other variables.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Faculty and curriculum are amazing. It is value for money. The hostel they suggested is the worst.

review_content.Placements: Since placements started last year, we do not have any data about them, but a few students secured internships. We do not have data, but they said that around 400 students from the Hyderabad campus got internships. Mostly, students got internships in startups.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure of the college are overall good. It has Wi-Fi connection, well-maintained classrooms with Wi-Fi, Centralized AC, a lush green campus, and a big library with lots of books. It suggested Nalanda Hostel, which is not good at all. It charges Rs. 1,65,000. Facilities and food are the worst. The location is in a village where transportation is not available. We have to walk a few distances to get transport, so I would not recommend taking Nalanda Hostel.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning) - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied with the course. Hostel if not worthy, don't go to their recommended hostel.

review_content.Placements: No batch has been passed out till now. The first batch will pass out in 2027, so there is no information about placements. Several students from 1st year have got paid internships in startups and companies. Let's see what will happen in 2027. I think that because the college provides industry-ready courses, placements will be good.
review_content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are good, but Wi-Fi sometimes causes a problem. Seats and desks are very comfortable. There are smart boards and AC in every classroom. The hostel is very bad. Wi-Fi is the biggest problem here. The food is very bad, and no room cleaning is done every day. I don't recommend students join Nalanda Hostel.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning) - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: The college is good if your main goal is focused study.

review_content.Placements: In my college, there is a good placement ratio. I think, in my first year, they provided many tech-related events like buildathon, hackathon, and many more. They also focus on other things, like helping students grow social accounts and providing sessions on that.
review_content.Infrastructure: I would say infrastructure of the hostel and college are very bad. Hostel is provided by the college, but there is very bad management, like poor food quality and many other issues. But if you talk about the rooms, they are good.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning) - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: The truth about Nxt Wave that everyone needs to know.

review_content.Placements: It is our 1st batch here, so we do not know about placements. But after seeing such bad management, I do not expect to get an on-campus placement. I do not even know how to describe their bad management.
review_content.Infrastructure: Nalanda Hostel is worse than anyone can even imagine. There is literally no Wi-Fi, and all our studies at NxtWave are online, but still, there is no Wi-Fi in the hostel. All the hostelers are suffering because of this, and we all know that this semester, CGPA is doomed. Food quality is like eating rotten and unhygienic food. They promise an AC bus for transportation during admission, but we always go in a totally rusty and dusty bus where students do not even get seats to sit. Most students go to college every day.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning) - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: It is good for you if you are fully focused on studies and cut off other forms of enjoyment.

review_content.Placements: Basically, I am in my first year, but many opportunities are given by our college, like hackathon, buildathon, and many more. So I have a good opinion of placements, and I also talk to seniors who are in the 2nd year. They tell me that in the second year, almost 70% of students qualify for internships.
review_content.Infrastructure: NIAT does not have its own college campus. It has a tie-up with NIU in Noida. There is very bad management. There is also very bad management of the hostel they provide, like bad food, laundry, and housekeeping. Many bad things are in the hostel. There is no transparency between students and management.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning) - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: Excellent AI/ML curriculum, faculty, placement, and infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: The institute maintains collaboration with over 3,000 companies and top recruiters. For the course, the internship involves hands-on learning projects. The placement ecosystem is well-structured. It combines practical learning with industry exposure.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is well-designed to support both academic and residential needs for students. Classrooms are modern and digitally enabled. Labs are well-equipped with PCs. Accommodation is comfortable and secure with proper lighting and furniture.

highlights.summary:
The AP EAPCET 2026 registration last date has been extended to Mar 24, 2026, (without a late fee) for MVR College of Engineering and Technology admission to the BTech and BPharma courses. The BTech exams are scheduled for May 12 to May 15, and on May 18, 2026, followed by the BPharma exam on May 19 and May 20, 2026.

A few more updates are given below:

student_insights.feedback: Offered in the final year only
Higher in core jobs
Both inside India & outside India
Students are expected to reach out to companies themselves
Organized & proactive placement process
Strong alumni network that help with placement opportunities
Very Active and resourceful, college is also involved
Love being in college

fees_and_eligibility.overview: MVR College of Engineering and Technology offers a wide range of programmes to students at the UG and PG levels. The college is mainly concerned with streams such as Engineering, Business & Management Studies and IT & Software. At the UG level, the college offers courses such as B.E. / B.Tech. At the PG level, the college offers courses such as M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM and MCA. MVR College of Engineering and Technology courses are offered to students in Full Time mode. Further, the fees structure for MVR College of Engineering and Technology courses stands around INR 70,000 to 1,60,000.

faqs.answer: A:    MVR College of Engineering and Technology courses are approved by eminent Government bodies such as AICTE. The combined seats available for various programmes provided by MVR College of Engineering and Technology goes up to 966.
faqs.question: How many seats are available at MVR College of Engineering and Technology for all courses combined?

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Our college is literally a hidden gem.

review_content.Placements: Our college offers better placements; over 60% of students get placed. The highest package is 12 LPA, and the average is 6 LPA, while 3 LPA is the least. Top MNCs like TCS and Infosys employ most of our college students. Internship percentage is above 50%. Top roles like Software Developer and Web Developer are offered.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities like Wi-Fi, digital board projectors, along with facilitated labs, are present at our college. The college library is very huge, along with a digital library. Hostel facilities are available for both girls and boys. There are multiple sports grounds and medical rooms too.

reviews_list.batch_info: Diploma in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Review of MVR College of Engineering and Technology.

review_content.Placements: Placements are good in this college, both for engineering and Diploma, so there's no need to worry about it. Almost every student got placements in small-scale companies. Some students reject the offers and choose higher studies; on the other hand, others choose to go with the offers given by companies. Most of the companies that hire us are startups and small companies. The highest package in my course is 3.2 per annum. Every student will be given an internship by the college itself.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college looks good outside than inside; my college is the one with the longest building I have seen. Infrastructure is average, and roads are the worst ever during rains. It was difficult for students who come by walk during that time. College has facilities like Wi-Fi available, but in some places only, cooling water available during winter, the library also very useful with a good collection of important books available. I don't know about the hostel; my house is near to the college, so I go and come by walk only.

answer.text: MVR College of Engineering and Technology has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidates who have passed Diploma in Engineering or any other examination recognised as equivalent there to, from a recognised Institute/ University, Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana are also eligible. Candidates who have appeared in Diploma in Engineering and who are awaiting their results can also apply on provisional basis. Candidates should belong to the state of Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana. Candidate should have completed 16 years of age as of 31st December of the year of admission (2023). There is no upper age limit.After 10th DiplomaCandidates should have passed S.S.C. Examination (Class 10th) conducted by State Board of Secondary Education, Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana or any other examination recognised as equivalent thereto by the Board of Secondary Education, A.P/TS. such as CBSE, ICSE, NIOS, A.P. Open School Society (APOSS), X class examination conducted by various State Boards of Secondary Education in India with Mathematics as one of the subjects. Candidates belonging to NIOS/APOSS/Other Examinations recognised as equivalent to SSC by A.P. Govt. should have passed all the subjects including Mathematics, Physics, Chemistry, with minimum of 35% marks in each subject. Candidates who appeared or are appearing for SSC or equivalent examination being held in April/ May-2023, and whose results are yet to be declared can also apply. There is no age restriction.M.E./M.TechCandidate must have passsed B.E./B.Tech. in relevant stream and obtained at least 50% marks (45% in case of reserved category candidates) from an AICTE/UGC approved institution recognised by the Government of Andhra Pradesh as equivalent thereto. Final year appearing students may also apply on provisional basis.MBA/PGDMCandidate must have completed Bachelor degree of 3/4 years duration with above mentioned marks from any recognised University/Institute. 45% marks for BC categories. Candidate who are appearing for the final year degree examination are also be eligible. Degree obtained by Distance Mode Program should have recognition by Joint Committee of UGC, AICTE and DEC/DEB. Candidate who passed all the subjects of the three years of any Degree course in one sitting is not eligible for admission.

faqs.question: How can I get into MVR College of Engineering and Technology for UG/PG courses? Am I eligible for admission?

rows:
Candidates who have passed Diploma in Engineering or any other examination recognised as equivalent there to, from a recognised Institute/ University, Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana are also eligible.
Candidates who have appeared in Diploma in Engineering and who are awaiting their results can also apply on provisional basis.
Candidates should belong to the state of Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana.
Candidate should have completed 16 years of age as of 31st December of the year of admission (2023).
There is no upper age limit.

Candidates should have passed S.S.C. Examination (Class 10th) conducted by State Board of Secondary Education, Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana or any other examination recognised as equivalent thereto by the Board of Secondary Education, A.P/TS. such as CBSE, ICSE, NIOS, A.P. Open School Society (APOSS), X class examination conducted by various State Boards of Secondary Education in India with Mathematics as one of the subjects.
Candidates belonging to NIOS/APOSS/Other Examinations recognised as equivalent to SSC by A.P. Govt. should have passed all the subjects including Mathematics, Physics, Chemistry, with minimum of 35% marks in each subject.
Candidates who appeared or are appearing for SSC or equivalent examination being held in April/ May-2023, and whose results are yet to be declared can also apply.
There is no age restriction.

Candidate must have passsed B.E./B.Tech. in relevant stream and obtained at least 50% marks (45% in case of reserved category candidates) from an AICTE/UGC
approved institution recognised by the Government of Andhra Pradesh as equivalent thereto.
Final year appearing students may also apply on provisional basis.

Candidate must have completed Bachelor degree of 3/4 years duration with above mentioned marks from any recognised University/Institute.
45% marks for BC categories.
Candidate who are appearing for the final year degree examination are also be eligible.
Degree obtained by Distance Mode Program should have recognition by Joint Committee of UGC, AICTE and DEC/DEB.
Candidate who passed all the subjects of the three years of any Degree course in one sitting is not eligible for admission.

overview_faqs.answer: The flagship courses offered at MVR College of Engineering and Technology are B.Tech, After 1th Diploma, M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM. The Institute has experienced faculty offering the best education to students. On the basis of Shiksha verified reviews, MVR College of Engineering and Technology has a rating of 3.8 by students. The college's campuslife, placements, faculty and Infrastructure has been rated as 4, 3.8, 3.7 and 3.6 as per reviews by students.

review_summary.college_name: MVR College of Engineering and Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence ) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Good college for placements but not for infrastructure and technology.

content.Placements: This is one of the best colleges for placements in the surrounding area and has a track record of getting 100 percent placement in the last 3 years. The highest package was good and average and the lowest package was also quite good. The top companies that come here for placements are TCS, Accenture, Capgemini, Wipro, HCL, Surya Tech, Infosys, L&T, and many more. A dedicated placement cell always works hard to bring companies and internships to students.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure in my college was average, like in regular colleges; nothing more special here. The quality of the facilities available here is okay—not top notch but adjustable. The quality of food here was the worst; better not to eat in the mess but the college canteen has tasty food available. The library and labs are well equipped with equipment and books. Sports and games have a separate big field available.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Good college if you got in EAMCET join with out doubt.

content.Placements: 85% of the students were placed in my course. The highest, lowest, and average packages offered were 14 LPA, 3.2 LPA, and 4.5 LPA, respectively. Top recruiting companies for my course include Cisco, Airbus, HP, Fidelity, TCS, IBM, Nutanix, and Citicorp. Forty percent of the students got internships in top companies like Wipro, IBM, TCS, and Amazon. The top roles offered in my course include Software Developer, Web Developer, System Engineer, and Programmer.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure available for my course are good in the department. Amenities like Wi-Fi, drinking water, and hygiene facilities are well-maintained by the college. The quality of facilities in the hostel is good, and the food available in the mess and canteen tastes good. Medical facilities, sports, and games are available and conducted every day.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Our college is literally a hidden gem.

content.Placements: Our college offers better placements; over 60% of students get placed. The highest package is 12 LPA, and the average is 6 LPA, while 3 LPA is the least. Top MNCs like TCS and Infosys employ most of our college students. Internship percentage is above 50%. Top roles like Software Developer and Web Developer are offered.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities like Wi-Fi, digital board projectors, along with facilitated labs, are present at our college. The college library is very huge, along with a digital library. Hostel facilities are available for both girls and boys. There are multiple sports grounds and medical rooms too.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Review of MVR College of Engineering and Technology.

content.Placements: Placements are good in this college, both for engineering and Diploma, so there's no need to worry about it. Almost every student got placements in small-scale companies. Some students reject the offers and choose higher studies; on the other hand, others choose to go with the offers given by companies. Most of the companies that hire us are startups and small companies. The highest package in my course is 3.2 per annum. Every student will be given an internship by the college itself.
content.Infrastructure: The college looks good outside than inside; my college is the one with the longest building I have seen. Infrastructure is average, and roads are the worst ever during rains. It was difficult for students who come by walk during that time. College has facilities like Wi-Fi available, but in some places only, cooling water available during winter, the library also very useful with a good collection of important books available. I don't know about the hostel; my house is near to the college, so I go and come by walk only.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Review of MVR College of Engineering and Technology.

content.Placements: Our college provides very great placements. We get placements from companies like TCS, Wipro, etc. Nowadays, it is very hard to get placed because of the competition in the market.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the hostel is good. We get hot water and Wi-Fi facilities. Our hostel serves good idli, sambar, and chutney. It has a swimming pool, an indoor gym, and a good warden. There are strict rules in the hostel. The gate will be closed at 9 AM.
content.Faculty: The teaching is excellent. They are very old and experienced. There is only one female teacher. She teaches English. Teachers are well educated, but sometimes they are not good. They are very helpful to students in every aspect.

admission_process.title: MVR College of Engineering and Technology Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Admission at MVR College of Engineering and Technology are both merit and entrance-based as per the course. Students are offered programmes at UG, PG and After 10th level. These courses are offered in full time mode. To get admission inMVR College of Engineering and Technology, students must meet the eligibility. The applications are accepted online. Some of the accepted entrance tests include GATE, AP EAMCET, and AP PGECET, and more. For merit-based admissions, scores in last qualifying exam are the criteria. The college library is very huge, along with a digital library.
Hostel facilities are available for both girls and boys.
There are multiple sports grounds and medical rooms too.

reviews.review_heading: Review of MVR College of Engineering and Technology.
reviews.review_text: The college looks good outside than inside; my college is the one with the longest building I have seen. Infrastructure is average, and roads are the worst ever during rains. It was difficult for students who come by walk during that time. College has facilities like Wi-Fi available, but in some places only, cooling water available during winter, the library also very useful with a good collection of important books available. I don't know about the hostel; my house is near to the college, so I ...

reviews.review_heading: Review of MVR College of Engineering and Technology.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the hostel is good. We get hot water and Wi-Fi facilities. Our hostel serves good idli, sambar, and chutney. It has a swimming pool, an indoor gym, and a good warden. There are strict rules in the hostel. The gate will be closed at 9 AM.

reviews.review_heading: One of the good colleges.
reviews.review_text: The facilities in our college was very satisfied. The classrooms, labs are very good and cleaned. There is also library with lots of best books are available. There is no hostel facility, all the students who are from long places they will take rooms or in private hostels.

reviews.review_heading: Review of MVR College of Engineering and Technology.
reviews.review_text: The campus is 10 acres in total. The building is not much good, but it is enough for students. The sports ground is not bad, and during the rainy days, it will be affected. Most of the roads in our college are not much good, but the infrastructure is good.

reviews.review_heading: Our college was established in 2008, and it is good.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is good. Our department has 3 computer labs. Our college has a library and a digital library. The classrooms have green glass boards and projectors. Each classroom has very neat benches. The hostel rooms are clean and hygienic. Only 3 members share a room, and a room has two fans. The quality of the food in canteen is good and hygienic. The warden has first-aid kits for students. Our college has a huge playground for outdoor games, and indoor games are also available.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied because of the good faculty members and good infrastructure provided here.
reviews.review_text: There are all facilities in our college except for Wi-Fi. All facilities are good, but the food served is not good. The hostel is very good in our college, and the girls' hostel is very secure here. Medical facilities are also available, and some sports and games facilities are available.

reviews.review_heading: It was totally good with excellent faculty members and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: We had Wi-Fi facility, different labs related to course, classrooms and digital and normal library. We had a big playground in front of the college, and We had a canteen with different food items with quality. Moreover, we had medical facilities and indoor games.

reviews.review_heading: Review of MVR College of Engineering and Technology.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides a bus facility, which is a great advantage. Our college provides Wi-Fi facility along with each lab with the designated technician. The library is available with a lot of books and computers with internet access. The hotel facility is good with minimum requirements like a mess, first-aid and other amenities.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: There will be strict rules, but we have wonderful facilities. Wi-Fi in our college is unlimited. Classrooms are very neat, and the library is the best. Hostel facilities were good, and there are boys and girls hostels within the campus. Food served was excellent. There will be games and sports competitions, and medical facilities are also available here. Our college was NAAC graded and will be shortly autonomous.

reviews.review_heading: It is a better college for students.
reviews.review_text: We have all the lab facilities in our college. Whatever you want to study regarding the course, they provide it.  We have a huge playground, games, and a huge garden. There is a nice infrastructure, and we have separate blocks.

reviews.review_heading: I am somewhat dissatisfied because of placements and faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Labs and classrooms are good here, and our college also has projector enabled classrooms. The library also has very useful and interesting books, but they need to improve somewhat in the library. Mobiles are not allowed in our college, and our college environment is very pleasant. There is also a hostel.

reviews.review_heading: The infrastructure and facilities in the college are very good, but it is a bit far from the city.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good. Every branch has a separate block in the college. The environment on campus is the best with full of greenery. Food served in the canteen is good. The maintenance of toilets is good. Everything is good here. Our college has a big library to gain knowledge about current affairs.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: The college is good, and it provides placements. Faculty and staff members are also very good here.

content.Placements: In the computer engineering course, there are 60 intake of students and about 30 intake of diploma students. The highest salary package offered is 18 LPA and the lowest salary package offered is 4 LPA. Companies from Ahmedabad like The One Technologies, The Silent Infotech, etc., visit the college for placements. Roles offered are junior engineer and software developer.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college hostel and the buildings are newly painted. The hostel room condition is good, and it has a Wi-Fi facility. There is also a mess in the hostel, which provides healthy and nutritious foods. There is a games room for playing table tennis.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Students can take admission to this college at their own risk.

content.Placements: Almost 100% of students got placed from our course. The highest salary package offered is 30 LPA which is grabbed by one of students from our course. The lowest salary package offered is 3 LPA and the average salary package offered is 8 LPA. Recruiting companies are TCS, Infosys, and many more. Internship is secured by every student in our college in their respective companies. Software engineer is the top role offered in our course.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is very poor in our department. There are PCs which are not working. Our college is Wi-Fi enabled but this facility is only for faculty members not for students. Labs are not cleaned. Library of our college is well-maintained. The quality of food is the worst we have ever tasted. Sports equipment is there but not all equipments is available.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Really satisfied with the college, great faculty, and good placement.

content.Placements: Almost 100% of students got placed in my course. The highest salary package was around 2 LPA. Placements come from TCS, Infosys, Wipro, etc. A 100% placement rate has been provided by Government Engineering College Dahod. The top roles offered were site engineers for BE students.
content.Infrastructure: The overall infrastructure of the college is very nice. Classrooms are huge and clean. Labs have almost all facilities and equipment, though the Wi-Fi can be slow sometimes in college. The library has a massive collection of books for all courses and also for GATE exams.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Gec - Dahod CSE branch review.

content.Placements: Our batch consists of around 70 students (regular and diploma) combined; it's a very diverse class with students from different places across the state. The course we have is in CE. It consists of basic courses in the 1st year and courses like DSA, DBMs, COA, and OS in the 2nd year, and Algo, TOC, and OO in the 3rd year. In the 4th year, we have mainly internships.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is amazing, with all the facilities available within the campus area, like the canteen, library, sports field, etc. We have separate buildings for each department, and they have clean classrooms with enough accommodation and a lab for each task. The hostel is good, clean, and has all the facilities.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Government Engineering College Dahod college review.

content.Placements: The batch consists of 70 students (regular and diploma). It's quite a diverse batch. The curriculum consists of basic engineering subjects in 1st year, and in 2nd year, your will have basic engineering courses such as DBMS, this, Digital Logic, OS, COA, etc. The course is quite similar to other college CSE courses.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure consists of separate buildings for each department with decent campus infrastructure. The laboratories are well-equipped with all the stuff needed during lab hours and they are accessible anytime during working hours. The quality of faculty varies across the department; some are highly knowledgeable and dedicated, while others need improvement.

reviews.review_heading: All you need to know about GEC Dahod.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms and other buildings are like same as other government colleges. Mostly students use their own laptops in lab but you can also use college computers, we have large numbers of computers. Hostel facility is average as we do not have proper mess but I am sure you will enjoy it, faculty is not so strict and always ready to help. Also, we celebrate most of the festivals in hostel. You can play most of the sports such as cricket, football, tennis, table tennis etc. We have all of them in our...

reviews.review_heading: My college is good for me, because of free education and also provide economic hostel fees.
reviews.review_text: The government engineering College campus is so beautiful and big. Many blocks are available in my colleges such as different engineering departments, library blocks, and Wi-Fi. My college hostel facilities are good and economic and also the sports ground is good and the environment too.

reviews.review_heading: Placements are not provided in this college.
reviews.review_text: Building of our college is good. It is expanded in a very large area but it is in a forest-type area. Students are not allowed to go out after 9 PM. I recommend students not to take admission to this college. Facilities provided in our college are not good.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Government Engineering College, Dahod.
reviews.review_text: Many facilities are provided by the Gujarat University for students of B.E like Wi-Fi, Laboratories, a library, and good classrooms. The hostel and canteen facilities are good. The mess facility is not available in the hostel so students face problems.

reviews.review_heading: In this college, the fee is affordable and the study is decent.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides government hostels for boys and girls separately. The courses are authorized by Gujarat Technological University. There are mechanical engineering, electrical engineering, electronic and communication engineering, computer science, and civil engineering.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is very good in 2015.
reviews.review_text: College infrastructure is very poor because the college builds in 2009. Wi-Fi is available but with a networking issue. Library management is not good and has no faculty.

reviews.review_heading: I'm satisfied with the college as it is a government college.
reviews.review_text: Almost every facility is available in our college which a student requires, like a library with lots of books, a canteen for lunch and breakfast, Wi-Fi with a speed of 300 Mbps, a good playground, top-quality sports facilities etc. The major problem we face is related to food. Although the college is trying to solve all the problems faced by students.

reviews.review_heading: It has a good educational environment and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is beautifully designed, everything is so spacious. We have all the necessary facilities that one requires in a college. The labs are well-equipped and have state-of-art technologies. We have an amazing concept of Makerspace lab that has 3D printers, laser cutters, and all equipment you require to make your ideas come to life. The hostel is good, and the food provided in the canteen and hostel mess is good. We have a vast auditorium that can hold up to 1000 people at any time.

reviews.review_heading: It provides good faculty staff, but the infrastructure is not that great.
reviews.review_text: Library and canteen are average in this college. Wi-Fi does not work most of the time. There is a lot of reference book related to the subject. There is also a great sitting area in the library for study. The canteen mess food is same as other colleges, they are average.

college_info.intro:
The Info Institute of Engineering offers a wide range of courses at the undergraduate, postgraduate, and doctoral levels through its various departments such as Artificial and Data Science, Mechanical Engineering, Electronics and Communication Engineering, Computer Science and Engineering, Information Technology, Electrical and Electronic Engineering, Management Studies, and Science & Humanities, among others.
At the UG level, IIE Coimbatore offers the BTech and BE programmes in various branches such as Information Technology, Artificial Intelligence & Data Science, Computer Science & Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Electronics & Electronics Engineering Engineering, and Mechanical Engineering.
The BTech programme offered by the college is highly popular due to its promising career prospects. IIE Coimbatore follows an industry-aligned curriculum to help students gain practical knowledge with deep digital insights. The college has also established multiple partnerships to regularly organise industry-driven training and certification programmes, internship opportunities, and industry visits for students.
Below mentioned are the popular Info Institute of Engineering courses, along with fees and eligibility:

answer.text: Info Institute of Engineering - IIE has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:CourseEligibilityBE/ BTechCandidate must have passed VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. from schools situated in Tamil Nadu. Tamil Nadu native candidate who has passed any of the VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. or their equivalent exam from schools situated outside Tamil Nadu can also apply. They should produce an Original Nativity Certificate. Children of Central Government Employees, irrespective of their nativity, provided their parents or guardians (only if both parents are not alive) have been serving in Tamil Nadu continuously for the past five years can be eligible to apply. Sons & daughters of All India Service Tamil Nadu cadre officers are eligible to apply. A Self-declaration from the parent in this regard is to be produced. Children of employees in the Public Sector or Government recognised institutions had been working in their organisations for the past five years are also eligible, irrespective of their domicile. Other State candidates who have studied VIII, IX, X, XI, and XII Std. in Tamil Nadu are eligible to apply.ME/ MTechCandidates who have completed 10+2+AMIE or 10+3 years Diploma + AMIE are also eligible. AMIE candidates must have 2 years of regular full-time experience in the relevant field.MBA/ PGDMCandidates who have completed 10+2+AMIE or 10+3 years Diploma + AMIE are also eligible. AMIE candidates must have 2 years of regular full-time experience in the relevant field.
