admission_process.title: Info Institute of Engineering - IIE  Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Info Institute of Engineering - IIE offers two courses at PG level and one course at UG level. Admission to both all the courses is entrance-based. Candidates interested in applying atInfo Institute of Engineering - IIEare required to register and apply for the entrance exams accepted by the college for admission to BTech, MTech and MBA. The college is affiliated with Anna University, However, the college follows the admission norms ofAnna Universityfor admission to all the courses. Read the below article to know more detailed information about Info Institute of Engineering - IIE admission 2025, along with course-wise eligibility, selection criteria and admission process 2025:

Info Institute of Engineering - IIE admission is ongoing for all courses. The college offers entrance-based admission to all courses. The college offers UG, and PG, courses, includingBTech/B.E., M.E. andMBA. Info Institute of Engineering - IIE offers one undergraduate course, including BTech/B.E.. The duration of the courses is four years. The college also offers M.E. and MBS at the postgraduate level with a duration of two years.

To be eligible for admission, candidates are required to apply and appear for the entrance exam accepted by the college. The college acceptsTNEA counsellingscores for admission to BTech/B.E. and TANCET, GATE and CEETA exam scores for admission to MBA and M.E., respectively. Want to know other details about Info Institute of Engineering - IIE course eligibility along with selection criteria, check out the table below:
Eligibility
Selection Criteria

Info Institute of Engineering - IIE admission process includes filling out the application form qualifying for the selection rounds and paying the fee to grab the final seat. Check below the detailed steps of Info Institute of Engineering - IIE admission 2025:
STEP 1: Info Institute of Engineering - IIE Application Process 2025

Candidates are required to register for TANCET, GATE and CEETA for admission to PG courses. Additionally, for admission to BTech/ B.E. candidates are required to register and appear for TNEA Counselling. Candidates are required to visit the official website of the college to fill out the application form online for admission.
STEP 2: Info Institute of Engineering - IIE Selection Round

Info Institute of Engineering - IIE selects candidates for BTech/ B.E., MBA andM.E.based on entrance exams along with counselling such as TNEA Counselling, TANCET, GATE and CEETA entrance exams, respectively.
Step 3: Admission Confirmation
The selected candidates are required to pay theInfo Institute of Engineering - IIE course feeto complete their enrollment within the given deadline to confirm and grab the final seat.

Candidates who want to be admitted to Info Institute of Engineering - IIE are required to fulfil the basic eligibility criteria and apply and appear for TNEA counselling round. The basic eligibility for BTech is passing Class 10 and Class 12 from a recognised board. For more details about Info Institute of Engineering - IIE BTech admission 2025, go through the following section:

faqs.question: How can I get admission to Info Institute of Engineering - IIE for BTech?
faqs.answer: Info Institute of Engineering - IIE offers entrance-based admission to BTech. To be eligible for admission to BTech, candidates are required to pass Class 10 and Class 12 from a recognised board. Additionally, candidates are required to apply and appear for TNEA Counselling accepted by the college. After filling out all the eligibility criteria candidates need to apply for admission form online.

faqs.question: What is the total fee of the BTech course offered by Info Institute of Engineering - IIE?
faqs.answer: The BTech course fee offered by Info Institute of Engineering - IIE is INR 2 lakh. The fees might include components other than tuition fees. The mentioned fee is as per Tamil Nadu Engineering Admission (TNEA- 2023). Candidates are required to pay the course fee after completion of all the selection rounds to confirm their seats. Further, candidates note that the given fee is as per the official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

courses_data.name: Info Institute of Engineering - IIE MBA Admission 2025
courses_data.description: Info Institute of Engineering - IIE MBA admission is entirely entrance-based. Candidate must pass graduation degree to be eligible to apply for the course. Additionally, candidates are required to apply and appear for TANCET exam, followed by counselling. Mention below are more updates about Info Institute of Engineering - IIE MBA admission 2025:

faqs.question: Is MBA available at Info Institute of Engineering - IIE?
faqs.answer: Yes, Info Institute of Engineering - IIE offers an MBA course for two years. The college offers admission to MBA entirely entrance-based. To be eligible for admission, candidates are required to apply and appear for TANCET exam, followed by counselling. To fill out the application form candidates are required to visit the college's official website. Additionally, candidates must pass graduation in the relevant stream to be eligible to apply for the course.

courses_data.name: Info Institute of Engineering - IIE M.E. Admission 2025
courses_data.description: Info Institute of Engineering - IIE offers entrance-based admission to M.E. The college accepts GATE and GEETA entrance exam scores. Info Institute of Engineering - IIE M.E. offers a two-year full-time course at the postgraduate level. For admission to M.E., candidates are required to visit the official website of the college to apply for admission. Check below to know more about Info Institute of Engineering - IIE M.E. admission 2025:

faqs.question: Can I apply for M.E. at Info Institute of Engineering - IIE?
faqs.answer: Info Institute of Engineering - IIE admission is open for ME The college offers entrance-based admission to ME. The college accepts various entrance exams for admission to ME includingGATE and CEETA. Candidates looking for admission to Info Institute of Engineering - IIE must fill out theonline applicationform by visiting the official website of the college.

faqs.question: Can I take direct admission to M.E. at Info Institute of Engineering - IIE?
faqs.answer: No, Info Institute of Engineering - IIE offersentrance-based admission to ME. Candidates are required to apply and appear for the accepted entrance exams such asGATE and CEETA. After filling out the eligibility criteria candidates are required to apply on the official website of the college to fill out the admission form. After all the procedures the college releases its merit list. If the candidates got selected on merit they are required to pay the admission fee to lock their final seats.

faqs.question: Can I join Info Institute of Engineering - IIE without TNEA Counselling?
faqs.answer: No, without TNEA counselling candidates cannot apply for the BTech programme at Info Institute of Engineering - IIE. To be eligible for admission to BTech, the candidates must apply and appear in the counselling round. Additionally, for other courses including ME and MBA, it is not mandatory to appear in TNEA counselling.

faqs.question: Is there an entrance for admission to Info Institute of Engineering - IIE?
faqs.answer: Yes, Info Institute of Engineering - IIE accepts various entrance exams for admission to UG and PG, courses. The college offers one UG i.e., BTech/BE and two PG courses i.e., ME and MBA. The college accepts TNEA counselling for admission to BTech and TANCET, GATE, and CEETA for admission to MBA and ME, respectively. After filling out the admission criteria set by the college, candidates are required to apply to the official website of the college and fill out the admission form.

faqs.question: How can I get into Info Institute of Engineering - IIE for UG/PG courses? Am I eligible for admission?
faqs.answer: Info Institute of Engineering - IIE has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:CourseEligibilityBE/ BTechCandidate must have passed VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. from schools situated in Tamil Nadu. Tamil Nadu native candidate who has passed any of the VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. or their equivalent exam from schools situated outside Tamil Nadu can also apply. They should produce an Original Nativity Certificate. Children of Central Government Employees, irrespective of their nativity, provided their parents or guardians (only if both parents are not alive) have been serving in Tamil Nadu continuously for the past five years can be eligible to apply. Sons & daughters of All India Service Tamil Nadu cadre officers are eligible to apply. A Self-declaration from the parent in this regard is to be produced. reviews_list.review_title: Review of Samarth Group of Institutions.

review_content.Placements: More than 60% of students got placed at multinational companies. Top recruiting companies are TCS, Infosys, Capgemini, Dassault Systemes, Atos Syntel, and Bajaj. Top roles offered are software engineer and graduate engineer trainee. The salary package offered ranges between 4.75 LPA - 7.5 LPA. The salary packages depend on students' performance. Placement officers attend during the interview preparation for final year students.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: The college is good for the natural view and peaceful life.

review_content.Placements: No single role was provided waste of money. We were only told about different things but were not regarded about it properly. No one got placed in college everyone is finding jobs on their own doing things in life according to the perspective of getting a job on their own.
review_content.Infrastructure: The food in the mess was not good and felt like a waste of money. Every dish tasted the same, and although they could change the mess food, they haven't done so. As a result, we often ordered food from a hotel or went out to eat for a better meal. The food during the daytime was decent, but the nighttime meals were not tasty at all.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: One of the best infrastructure colleges in a rural area.

content.Placements: One of the best rural area colleges for placement. They provide you with the best job. The best package with one of the best placement departments. The placement department was very helpful and very kind towards students. They are all like a family member to students.
content.Infrastructure: One of the best fest for rural areas and with the best extracurricular activities. One of the best fest for rural areas and with the best extracurricular activities. Hostels for students to live at NIT and a clean environment with the best beds and food. Clean toilets and the best security with all areas covered with CCTV and a watchman. All services are provided for students at a minimal fee. I will suggest that everyone should visit the college.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Telecommunication Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Too awesome is this college named Samarth Group of Institutions College of Engineering, Belhe.

content.Placements: As far as I am concerned, in my college, 50% of students were getting placements from every branch, especially in IT companies like TCS and Accenture. The packages offered in my course, E&TC, range from 3 LPA to 12 LPA, depending on the skills of the student. I think this is good enough for freshers too.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure are awesome, and anyone who visits can see that there is greenery everywhere. In my college, everyone has separate lab assistants in the VLSI lab, Microcontroller lab, Programming lab, and Electronics lab with proper daily arrangements. There is also free Wi-Fi available for students, which is used for studying. Medical facilities are available as there are two pharmacies near my college. Additionally, there are two canteens and one mess providing good food for students with a taste and quality rating of 10/10.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: An above average college for computer science.

review_content.Placements: In our college, 40–45% of the students gets placed in our course. Our college was giving good placements opportunities to the students. The average package offered at the college was between 3 and 6 LPA. The top recruiting companies in our college were JusPay, Slice, Infosys, Wipro, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college had average infrastructure for our course. Our college had good-quality facilities for the students. Wi-Fi, labs, libraries, canteens, etc. facilities were available for the students. The food in our college canteen was good to eat. Sports and other necessary facilities were also provided at our college.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: Good infrastructure, but average teaching staff.

review_content.Placements: 40% of students got placed. 6 LPA was the highest package and 2 LPA was the lowest. Tata is the top recruiting company. 30% of students got an internship, the college infrastructure is good and the campus is cool, the teaching staff is average, the labs and library are in good condition, and it was very encouraging in all activities and also good in all various levels of sports, dancing, singing, and all.
review_content.Infrastructure: The faculty was average. No Wi-Fi, good labs and equipment, good classrooms, etc. are there. Hostel rooms are good, average food is available, and Wi-Fi is available. Good sports facility. Wi-Fi is average, but hostel Wi-Fi is good and the drinking facility is good, with good quality food but good taste; no non-vegetarian food is served.

faqs.question: Q: Is Kalpataru Institute of Technology - KIT TIPTUR a good college/Institute?

faqs.answer: Kalpataru Institute of Technology, Tiptur is one of the most prestigious Engineering Colleges in Karnataka, India. Established in the year 2001, the college has received thumping applause for quality education, strong faculty and fantastic infrastructure. The institute offers undergraduate and postgraduate programmes in all fields of engineering with equal emphasis on theory and practice. KIT's focus on research, innovation, and industry collaboration adds much more repute to its name amongst the minds of the students and employers alike. On top of all this, the college has a placement cell that promotes employment for graduates. This makes it a good choice for aspiring engineers in the region.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: My college is good so far, not bad, but sometimes.

content.Placements: Placements are happening in my college. I am studying electronics and communication engineering. The highest package offered in my college is 14 LPA and the lowest is 3 LPA. Computer science and electronics students get more placement opportunities in my college. You can visit the college. The companies are TCS, Infosys, HCL, and Excerable.
content.Infrastructure: Labs are extremely good, and hostels are not bad. However, the food and accommodation are not great. The faculty, so far, is better than in other colleges. Labs are good, and nothing else can match them. However, they need to ensure that the education and school system continue to improve, making them better than other universities.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: I don't have much knowledge about placement. But there are good facilities.

content.Placements: Placements at Kalpataru Institute of Technology are moderate, with 60%-70% of students placed annually. Companies like Infosys, Wipro, and Capgemini visit, offering salary packages of around 3 LPA-4 LPA. While IT roles dominate, core engineering opportunities are limited. Students are encouraged to upskill for better prospects.
content.Infrastructure: I'm from Computer Science and our blocks are well built, but 7-8 months back our washrooms got demolished now they are building it. I don't stay in hostel, I attend college, as I'm a localite. My friends who stay in the hostel say that the mess food is not good. KIT offers six computer centers with 150 high-performance systems and an 80 Mbps dedicated internet connection to support hands-on learning.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: An above average college for computer science.

content.Placements: In our college, 40–45% of the students gets placed in our course. Our college was giving good placements opportunities to the students. The average package offered at the college was between 3 and 6 LPA. The top recruiting companies in our college were JusPay, Slice, Infosys, Wipro, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Our college had average infrastructure for our course. Our college had good-quality facilities for the students. Wi-Fi, labs, libraries, canteens, etc. facilities were available for the students. The food in our college canteen was good to eat. Sports and other necessary facilities were also provided at our college.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Good infrastructure, but average teaching staff.

content.Placements: 40% of students got placed. 6 LPA was the highest package and 2 LPA was the lowest. Tata is the top recruiting company. 30% of students got an internship, the college infrastructure is good and the campus is cool, the teaching staff is average, the labs and library are in good condition, and it was very encouraging in all activities and also good in all various levels of sports, dancing, singing, and all.
content.Infrastructure: The faculty was average. No Wi-Fi, good labs and equipment, good classrooms, etc. are there. Hostel rooms are good, average food is available, and Wi-Fi is available. Good sports facility. Wi-Fi is average, but hostel Wi-Fi is good and the drinking facility is good, with good quality food but good taste; no non-vegetarian food is served.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Information Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Our college has good atmosphere.

content.Placements: Almost 60-80% of students got placed in this course. The highest salary package offered was 12 LPA. The lowest salary package offered was 9 LPA. The minimum salary package offered was 4 LPA. The minimum salary package offered varies between 6 LPA - 7 LPA. Top recruiting companies are TCS, Wipro, Hiremee, and Infosys. Many students got internships in this course. Top roles offered are software engineer, consultant, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is not good. All facilities are available in this college. Drinking water facility is available. Washrooms are better. Classrooms are well-maintained and spacious. Smart boards are available in our college. Wi-Fi is available in the hostel. Reference hall is available. There is a decent library. Laboratories are better. Hostel facilities are very good. Hot water facility is available for bathing. The food served in the mess is decent. Canteen is better. Medical facilities are available. Hospitals and medical stores are available nearby our college. Sports are encouraged in this college. PE teacher is a national athlete and he trains the student in every game.

admission_process.title: Kalpataru Institute of Technology - KIT TIPTUR Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Kalpataru Institute of Technology - KIT TIPTUR admissions are based on merit. The institute considers applications of candidates meeting the eligibility criteria.Kalpataru Institute of Technology - KIT TIPTURoffers courses at UG and PG levels. Some of the courses include B.E. / B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech and MBA/PGDM. Candidates can apply online for the preferred course.
The total tuition fees for UG courses isINR 2,35,800 - 7,44,444. Aspirants may also need to pay one-time caution deposit at the time of admission.
The institute offers UG courses for 3 years - 4 years. PG courses are offered for 2 years.

Kalpataru Institute of Technology - KIT TIPTUR Karnataka PGCET cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final cutoff list. For admission to the MBA/PGDM course, the last round cutoff rank was 30133 in the General AI category.

Karnataka PGCET is the accepting exam for MBA/PGDM admission at Kalpataru Institute of Technology - KIT TIPTUR. hostel.description: The rooms are airy, modern and comfortable. Each room is shared by three students. There is a mess with very good cooking staff and all basic amenities are available.The girls hostel has its own compound with sports facilities; throw ball, badminton, table tennis and kho-kho. In boys hostel multi gym facility is available.

library.description: Library has a collection of more than 68,042 volumes of which about 13500 titles cover all disciplines in science and technology. highlights.summary: Established in 2004, The Institute of Chartered Financial Analysts of India University, Tripura is located in Tripura. The institute offers courses like B.E. / B.Tech and BBA. These courses are offered in Full Time mode. A total of 7 courses offered by the Institute are available across streams such as Engineering and Business & Management Studies. The institute has all the necessary facilities to the students.

placements.overview: Established in 2004, The Institute of Chartered Financial Analysts of India University, Tripura is located in Tripura. The institute offers courses like B.E. / B.Tech and BBA. These courses are offered in Full Time mode. A total of 7 courses offered by the Institute are available across streams such as Engineering and Business & Management Studies. The institute has all the necessary facilities to the students.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: It is a nice and beautiful university with a great campus.

review_content.Placements: 30% or more students get placed in our class. The package offered ranges from 3-35 LPA or more. IT sector companies, banks, consultancies, etc., visit the college to hire students. Mainly roles like software engineering, tech analysts, data scientists, etc., are offered. The percentage of students who got internships from our course is 50%.
review_content.Infrastructure: Everything is available. Wi-Fi-6 is available in the university. All labs are great and tidy. Classrooms are top-notch with smart boards, smart screens, etc. The food quality is good and at a cheap price, so all students can afford it. The food is all we can eat.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Limited internship opportunities with basic industry exposure at ICFAI Tripura.

review_content.Placements: Placements are decent with an average salary of around INR 4-6 LPA. The highest package is INR 10-12 LPA, and the lowest is around INR 3-4 LPA. Top recruiters include Tata Motors, L&T and Maruti Suzuki. Around 60-70 percent of students secure internships in similar firms.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our mechanical department has basic labs, classrooms, and a well-equipped library, though Wi-Fi is limited. Hostel facilities are average, with decent rooms. Mess food is simple but edible. Medical services are available on campus, and sports facilities include cricket, football, and volleyball.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Review of ICFAI University Tripura.

review_content.Placements: Placements are good but there are fewer opportunities for students. Top companies that have visited ICFAI are Wipro, Techno Mate, etc. Students should attain 70% to sit in the college placements without any back paper to maintain a good standard and make good presentations to companies. They have several in-college interactions with students in the placement sector.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college hostel provides good rooms. The food quality needs to be improved.
review_content.Faculty: The gender ratio is equal in the college with the different departments or in the engineering department.

answer.text: If we look at the market demand, no doubt there is huge demand for BTech (Full Form: Bachelor of Technology) graduates among top recruiters who are constantly looking for skilled and knowledgeable students with fresh ideas to enhance their business growth and profitability.Having said that, a few previous-year employment reports published by the Business Standard and Times of India suggest that students found it a struggle to land a high-paying job after completing BTech because of a lack of industry-specific skills and knowledge and cut-throat competition between Lacs of engineering students hunting for a job.Hence, it is very important for students to focus on enhancing their skill set according to industrial demands and technological advancements, stay updated regarding all industry trends, build good networks and, most importantly, take up internships to gain experience and stand out in front of the employer.Read more: B Tech Jobs in India

faqs.question: Is there enough demand for BTech graduates in the job market?

answer.text: Graduates with a BTech degree in CSE are in high demand across a plethora of work fields, as everything is ruled by computer technology these days and every industry needs strong software applications, network security, and database management systems for effective working. A few top industries recruiting BTech in CSE graduates are given here:IT & SoftwareProduct DevelopmentE-Commerce and Digital CommerceCloud Computing & AIData Science & AnalyticsBanking and FinTechAutomotiveHealthcareUseful Link: BTech CSE Career Scope

faqs.question: Which industries hire students with a BTech CSE qualification?

answer.text: After completing MTech, a candidate can easily find a job in research and development companies, manufacturing firms, and IT companies as Project Manager, Research Associate, and Senior Engineers. Some of the candidates also prefer academic jobs such as teaching in a college or becoming a professor. Candidates can also work as Lead Scientist, Lead Engineer and also work as consultants in popular organisations.Know more about -MTech Courses

Candidates can scroll down to this page to view the Yadavrao Tasgaonkar College of Engineering and Management JEE Main cutoff 2025 for various specialisations and categories. The Joint Seat Allocation Authority (JoSAA) will start the registration for JEE Main Counselling 2024 on June 10. A total of 6 rounds of JEE Main 2024 counselling will be conducted.

Yadavrao Tasgaonkar College of Engineering and Management cutoff 2025 was released via MHT CET entrance exam for admission to the B.E. / B.Tech course. For the General AI category students, the last round cutoff range was between 430222 and 605372 for B.E. / B.Tech admission. Considering the lowest cutoff rank of 430222, B.Tech. in Cyber Security turned out to be the most competitive branch for admission. In the first round, the cutoff rank for the same branch was 299692.
Considering the JEE Main last round cutoff 2025 for the General AI category students, the top most competitive course for admission was B.E. / B.Tech, with a cutoff rank closing at 430222.
For more categories, rounds and quotas, candidates must use the provided filters.
Some of the important dates related to JEE Main 2026 for admission are provided below. Candidates can keep track of the upcoming dates to be eligible for admission.

To make an informed decision students must compare different colleges accepting JEE Main for admission. The given below comparison data is based on the JEE Main last round cutoff data. The cutoff is for the General AI category.

MHT CET is the entrance exam for candidates seeking admission to the BE/BTech and other courses. The cutoff was released across different categories under the All India quota. For the General category, the Yadavrao Tasgaonkar College of Engineering and Management B.E. / B.Tech cutoff 2025 ranged between 40.04 and 55.19, with the most sought-after branch for admission being Information Technology, which had the highest cutoff percentile of 55.19. Similarly, with a lowest last-round cutoff percent

Yadavrao Tasgaonkar College of Engineering and Management MHT CET cutoff 2025 was released as percentiles, which means the higher the cutoff percentile, the more competitive the course is for admission and vice versa. Considering the last round cutoff data of 2025, Information Technology turned out to be the most competitive for admission, with a cutoff closing at 55.19. For the same competitive branch/course, the last round cutoff was 62.79 in the General category under the HS quota.

Admissions at Yadavrao Tasgaonkar College of Engineering and Management for B.E. / B.Tech are done on the basis of MHT CET percentiles. For the next academic session, students can find out more about the MHT CET 2026 important dates in the table below:

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Himalayan School of Science and Technology, Swami Rama Himalayan University offers a wide range of programmes at both UG and PG levels. With option for Full Time learning, students can choose from several streams such as Engineering, IT & Software and Science. At the UG stage, courses available include B.E. / B.Tech, B.Sc. and BCA. For the PG level, there is a wide range of courses like MCA. Himalayan School of Science and Technology, Swami Rama Himalayan University fee structure ranges between INR 90,000 to 7,20,000.

review_content.General: The pass percentage in our college is 40%. Teachers are very helpful. Teachers are masters in their degrees. They teach us with humbleness and with clarity. This course makes the students industry-ready. Semester exams are sometimes it's tough, sometimes easy. All the faculty members are very humble and excellent. They teach us with perfection.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: College is really good in terms of study, sports, and discipline.

review_content.Placements: Our college has a placement of 90%. Highest salary package offered is 18 LPA. Lowest salary package is 3 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Google and Microsoft. Internship ratio is 40 to 50%. Roles offered by courses are software engineer and developer.
review_content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are good and well-ventilated. There is Wi-Fi access for faculty and students. Quality of food and accommodation in hostel is great. Security is tight and friendly. There are medical as well as sports and games facilities for all.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: We have a peaceful campus with supportive faculty.

review_content.Placements: Around 70% of students are placed in BCA. The highest package is 7 LPA, with an average of around 3-4 LPA. Companies like Wipro, Infosys, and TCS visit for placements. About 70% of students secure internships in startups, with roles such as web developer and software trainee. The training and placement cell is improving every year.
review_content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are equipped with smart technology, and labs are updated with Wi-Fi and necessary tools. Hostel rooms are clean, the mess food is good, and 24/7 medical care is provided via Himalayan Hospital. Sports and gym facilities are good, including football grounds and other indoor and outdoor areas.

review_summary.college_name: Himalayan School of Science and Technology, Swami Rama Himalayan University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Great infrastructure, supportive teachers, and strong placements – A well-rounded campus experience.

content.Placements: Approximately 15-20 percent of students got placed through campus placements. The highest package is 3.5 LPA - 4 LPA. The lowest package is 1 LPA - 1.5 LPA. Infosys and TCS are the recruiting companies. Around 90-100 percent of eligible students secured internships. Software developer role is offered in our course.
content.Infrastructure: All classrooms are spacious air conditioned and equipped with smart boards and projectors. High speed Wi Fi is available across the campus ensuring uninterrupted access to online resources and research platforms. The department library has a vast collection of textbooks reference materials journals and access to digital databases like.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Faculty members are very helpful and excellent knowledgeable.

content.Placements: Maximum 60% of students are placed in our college. I think the highest package is 6 LPA. Many companies are in contact with our college. Many companies visit our college also. Our college is NAAC+. Our seniors are placed in companies, they are in final year and all of them are placed.
content.Infrastructure: We have approximately 7-8 labs in our course. I don't know the number of labs in university. Also, Wi-Fi, classes, and library are available in our college.
content.Faculty: The pass percentage in our college is 40%. Teachers are very helpful. Teachers are masters in their degrees. They teach us with humbleness and with clarity. This course makes the students industry-ready. Semester exams are sometimes it's tough, sometimes easy. All the faculty members are very humble and excellent. They teach us with perfection.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: College is really good in terms of study, sports, and discipline.

content.Placements: Our college has a placement of 90%. Highest salary package offered is 18 LPA. Lowest salary package is 3 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Google and Microsoft. Internship ratio is 40 to 50%. Roles offered by courses are software engineer and developer.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are good and well-ventilated. There is Wi-Fi access for faculty and students. Quality of food and accommodation in hostel is great. Security is tight and friendly. There are medical as well as sports and games facilities for all.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: We have a peaceful campus with supportive faculty.

content.Placements: Around 70% of students are placed in BCA. The highest package is 7 LPA, with an average of around 3-4 LPA. Companies like Wipro, Infosys, and TCS visit for placements. About 70% of students secure internships in startups, with roles such as web developer and software trainee. The training and placement cell is improving every year.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are equipped with smart technology, and labs are updated with Wi-Fi and necessary tools. Hostel rooms are clean, the mess food is good, and 24/7 medical care is provided via Himalayan Hospital. Sports and gym facilities are good, including football grounds and other indoor and outdoor areas.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: They provide low placements which is a problem.

content.Placements: A few companies visit our college every year to recruit students from the computer science field, and the ones offering jobs are not big MNCs. The college should reach out to MNCs to enhance student selection.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is quite good. We have well-equipped labs and other facilities. The campus is vast and beautiful, nature-friendly, and appealing to everyone. The hostels are equipped with everything needed.
content.Faculty: Overall, teachers are good. Some teachers I have met are among the best I’ve ever seen, while others show attitudes and behaviors that students find off-putting. The exams and curriculum are good.

reviews.review_text: Facilities which are available for us are very good and useful. Facilities like strong Wi-Fi support, a water thank for drinking, and smart boards for lectures and online classes are there. A canteen is there for breakfast, lunch, and dinner which is very helpful for those students who live in the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the faculty, but the curriculum is not sufficient. Good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure available for my course or department are computer labs, classrooms, restrooms, libraries, a game room, a placement cell, etc. The hostel quality is average. The food is good. Medical facilities, sports, and games are available.

reviews.review_heading: Swami Drama Himalayan University has vast infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Swami Drama Himalayan University has a big and vast infrastructure. There are separate buildings for separate courses. The university also has good hostel facilities, and each course has its own hostel for students to stay. It also has good food facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and teachers are here.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure in our college is good; almost every facility is there; good computer labs are there; a canteen is there; and the cafeteria has top-quality food. A big playground is available in our college, along with tennis, badminton, volleyball, and basketball courts.

reviews.review_heading: SRHU review from my point of view.
reviews.review_text: According to me, the infrastructure here is tremendous; there are cleaned washrooms here and the cafeteria is around 100 metres away from the campus. In the hostel, there are laundry services, and the rooms in the hostels have all the facilities.

reviews.review_heading: SRHU moments according to me.
reviews.review_text: The college is well facilitated and a lot of facilities are provided here, like the whole campus wi-fi network, well-maintained classrooms and highly maintained libraries. Other facilities are also provided, like sports kits and canteens, and hostels are of high quality.

reviews.review_heading: Teaching, syllabus, and exams are very good, but the placement is very poor.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is very good and well-defined. Buildings, hostels, campus roads are well-defined. There are many facilities like water, electricity, canteens, gym, malls, arts, cafes, and laundry available inside the campus.

reviews.review_heading: Must visit college and extremely good faculty.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is quite good, clean washrooms, lifts are also well. New computers are their with i7 processors which is a very good thing. I personally appreciate my college for that. I am not in hostel but I knew that its good and also they have laundry services.

faqs.answer: A:    No, you cannot become a lawyer without a Law degree. You mandatorily need to obtain degrees such as BA/BCom/BSc/BBA LLB or LLB in order to be a lawyer in India. To become a lawyer, one must first complete three-year or five-year LLB from a recognised university and possess degree certificate. Then, they must enrol themselves in local Bar Council of the concerned state and enrolled as an advocate. Within two years of the enrolment, they must appear and clear AIBE in order to be eligible to practise anywhere in India.

overview_faqs.question: Is Computer Engineering a good choice for career?
overview_faqs.answer: Yes, CSE (full form Computer Science and Engineering) is a good career choice if you are aspiring for a good salary package as a fresher. A Computer Engineering graduate's average salary in India is approx. INR 6 lakh and higher. Also, owing to the exponential rise in AI & ML concept), CSE course gradutes have got a competitive job market and abundant opportunities for career growth.

overview_faqs.question: Where can I find the official PK University BBA fee details?
overview_faqs.answer: The official PK University BBA fee structure is available on the university's official website or can be confirmed through the concerned admission authorities. Since PK University BBA fees are subject to change, students should always verify the latest updates before applying.

overview_faqs.question: What do Electrical Engineering professionals do?
overview_faqs.answer: Electrical Engineering professionals are engineering jack of all trades, as they make use of their knowledge of Physics and Mathematics along with computer programming skills to develop intricate circuit systems. These circuit boards run electrical signals to and from electrical components to accomplish everything from a mundane computer startup to controlling absolute power and precision of a rocket going out of earth's atmosphere.Know more about -Electrical Engineering Courses

individual_reviews.title: College is overall good with good faculty and placements in 2023.

content.Placements: Minimum 8 CGPA students are placed. The highest packege of college is 8 Lacs per annum and the lowest 3 Lacs. Top recruiting companies are like adani ports. And minimum CGPA you got internship is 7.5 CGPA and roles offered in companies are like assistant web developed.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities are good in college but they not focus on practical knowledge. And infrastructure are not so good because college are under construction. And college are fully Wi-Fi and library are also good classroom are also with good infrastructure. Hostel are good infrastructure and food also are good in canteen. College are provide medical facilities. And college many cultural activities and sport and games.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: It was a good college for MBA especially, for distance learning program.

content.Placements: Our university provides a distance learning program. I did civil engineering from distance learning so I didn't get the campus placement. But those who do regular courses got placements as per their qualifications. The average salary package offered was 4 LPA. Roles provided were electrical engineer, IT engineer, process executive jobs, etc.
content.Infrastructure: All facilities like Wi-Fi, library, sports, and classrooms were available on campus. The hostel and canteen were good and food quality was also good enough. Medical facilities were available during emergencies. The infrastructure of the college was good.

individual_reviews.course: M.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Review of P.K. University.

content.Placements: In our college, almost 80% of students were placed. The lowest salary package offered was 5 LPA. Many students got jobs at Google, Microsoft, and many other companies. Around 75% of students got permanent jobs.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure was not good but the course was very good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: I suggest you enjoy your college life with great fun and build a promising future.

content.Placements: Students become eligible for campus placement after the 6th semester and can apply for various on and off-campus placements. Companies like Wipro, TCS and Accenture always visit our college to hire software developer freshers. The highest salary package offered is 8 LPA by Wipro. The average salary package offered ranges from 2-5 LPA. Almost 100% of students got an internship at the college. Companies also provide many internships and pre-placement offers. My plan is to look for a software developer job.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is not very good, and the walls have not been painted for years. Classrooms are very spacy and well-organised with proper windows, whiteboards and a projector. The library has sorts of books you will need with some interesting novels. Currently, there is no hostel facility for students.

student_insights.feedback: Students can work with faculty on research projects
Offered in the final year only
Many students looking for better jobs
Both in core & non-core jobs
Majority opted in India
Organized & proactive placement process
Students are expected to reach out to companies themselves
Strong alumni network that help with placement opportunities
Active but run mostly by students
Loved in first year but not in later years

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Samskruti College of Engineering and Technology is an institute which offers various courses at UG and PG levels. Students can choose Full Time programmes from streams such as Engineering, Business & Management Studies and IT & Software. At the UG level, students can choose the available programmes such as B.E. / B.Tech. Talking about PG level, some of the available courses include M.E./M.Tech and MBA/PGDM. The fee structure for the Samskruti College of Engineering and Technology programmes is around INR 44,700 to 2,88,000.

faqs.answer:
A:    Samskruti College of Engineering and Technology has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityM.E./M.TechCandidate must have completed B.E./B.Tech./AMIE in Electrical & Electronics Engg. / Electrical Engg. or Equivalent from a UGC recognised University/ Institute.
Preference will be given to GATE qualified candidates over TS PGECET qualified candidates.
Candidate belonging to reserve category can apply with 45% marks.MBA/PGDMCandidate must have passed Bachelor Degree (BA / B.Com/ B.Sc/ BBA / BBM / BCA / BE / B.Tech / B. Pharmacy / Any 3 or 4 year Degree except Oriental Languages). Examinations of minimum three years duration with at least 50% marks (45% marks in case of reserved categories) in the qualifying examinations.
Final year appearing students may also apply on provisional basis.
The minimum age of the candidates should be 19 years as on the date of notification (Candidates whose date of Birth up to 30th MARCH,  2003). No maximum age limit.B.E. / B.TechCandidates who have passed or appeared at the final year of the Diploma examination in Engineering conducted by the State Board of Technical Education and Training, Telangana / Andhra Pradesh or any other examination recognised as equivalent thereto by the State Board of Technical Education and Training, Telangana / Andhra Pradesh.
Candidates should have completed 16 years of age, as on 31st December of the year of admission. There is no upper age limit.After 10th DiplomaCandi

rows:
Candidate must have completed B.E./B.Tech./AMIE in Electrical & Electronics Engg. / Electrical Engg. or Equivalent from a UGC recognised University/ Institute.
Preference will be given to GATE qualified candidates over TS PGECET qualified candidates.
Candidate belonging to reserve category can apply with 45% marks.

Candidate must have passed Bachelor Degree (BA / B.Com/ B.Sc/ BBA / BBM / BCA / BE / B.Tech / B. Pharmacy / Any 3 or 4 year Degree except Oriental Languages). Examinations of minimum three years duration with at least 50% marks (45% marks in case of reserved categories) in the qualifying examinations.
Final year appearing students may also apply on provisional basis.
The minimum age of the candidates should be 19 years as on the date of notification (Candidates whose date of Birth up to 30th MARCH,  2003). No maximum age limit.

Candidates who have passed or appeared at the final year of the Diploma examination in Engineering conducted by the State Board of Technical Education and Training, Telangana / Andhra Pradesh or any other examination recognised as equivalent thereto by the State Board of Technical Education and Training, Telangana / Andhra Pradesh.
Candidates should have completed 16 years of age, as on 31st December of the year of admission. There is no upper age limit.

Candidates must have passed 10th examination conducted by State Board of Secondary Education, Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana or from any other recognised board in India with Mathematics as one of the subjects, and obtained at least 35% marks in the qualifying examination.
Candidate must have passed all the subjects including Mathematics, Physics, Chemistry, with minimum of 35% Marks in each subject.
Candidates who appeared or are appearing for SSC or equivalent examination being held in March/April-2023, and whose results are yet to be declared are also eligible.

review_summary.college_name: Samskruti College of Engineering and Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Dissatisfied because of the facility's, unexperienced faculty and a below average.

content.Placements: 60% of the students were placed. The highest package was 7 LPA and the lowest was 2 LPA. The top recruiting companies are Infosys and TCS. The top roles offered in our course are data scientist and software developer. 40% of the students from our course have secured internships.
content.Infrastructure: Overall, the infrastructure is average and does not meet expectations. The college has labs, Wi-Fi, a canteen, medical facilities, and a large playground, including a basketball court. The quality of food in the college canteen is average and not top-notch.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Data Science) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Events are not conducted.

content.Placements: In my course, there are 120 students. The highest package is 10-15 LPA, and the lowest is 5 LPA. Infosys and Tech Mahindra are the top recruiters. Around 20-25% of students get internships in software engineering and other courses. However, this college is only for graduates who want to claim an undergraduate certificate.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities are not bad, but we have quite poor Wi-Fi. Classrooms are good, and labs are well maintained. The food is super. They also provide snacks and tea when needed. They provide breakfast in the morning and meals in the afternoon for lunch, and the food is super good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028

content.Infrastructure: There are so many courses there is no mechanical branch available for the 2024. There is a library but only 1 for all blocks. Hostels are available for girls only. I'm not that much impressed by canteen and our college contains sports room with equipment and playground.

There is a library available in our college which contains many books of separate branch and gives a lot of information about the subjects.

individual_reviews.title: Good infrastructure, etc.

content.Placements: This year 3 members got placed with an average package. Placements in this college are average but the studies are good. This year a person got 3 LPA to 3.5 LPA package which is an average package. But the students will have knowledge of the course.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility to get admission in Samskruti College of Engineering and Technology for UG/PG courses?
faqs.answer:
Samskruti College of Engineering and Technology has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:CoursesEligibilityM.E./M.TechCandidate must have completed B.E./B.Tech./AMIE in Electrical & Electronics Engg. / Electrical Engg. or Equivalent from a UGC recognised University/ Institute.
Preference will be given to GATE qualified candidates over TS PGECET qualified candidates.
Candidate belonging to reserve category can apply with 45% marks.MBA/PGDMCandidate must have passed Bachelor Degree (BA / B.Com/ B.Sc/ BBA / BBM / BCA / BE / B.Tech / B. Pharmacy / Any 3 or 4 year Degree except Oriental Languages). Examinations of minimum three years duration with at least 50% marks (45% marks in case of reserved categories) in the qualifying examinations.
Final year appearing students may also apply on provisional basis.
The minimum age of the candidates should be 19 years as on the date of notification (Candidates whose date of Birth up to 30th MARCH,  2003). No maximum age limit.B

description: Samskruti College of Engineering and Technology cutoff 2025 has been released for admission to MBA programmes via the TSI ICET entrance examination result. Students should scroll down to this page to know the round, category, and year-wise cutoff for TSI ICET and other accepted exams. Refer to the pointers below for more updates:

Samskruti College of Engineering and Technology TS EAMCET cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final cutoff list. The cutoff was released as opening and closing ranks for the AI and HS quota. In the General category under the HS quota, the last round closing ranks ranged between 49588 and 70701 for B.E. / B.Tech admission. B.Tech. in Computer Science and Information Technology was the toughest to get admission into, considering its competitive cutoff rank. For other B.E. / B.Tech sp

For B.E. / B.Tech admission, the top three most competitive branches were B.Tech. in Computer Science and Information Technology, B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering and B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Data Science), with competitive TS EAMCET last round cutoff ranks of 49588, 57630 and 60966, respectively. These ranks are valid for the students belonging to the General HS quota.

For 2026 admission, candidates can refer to the table below to view some of the important TS EAMCET dates. TS EAMCET is a state-level entrance test for admission to BE, B.Tech, BPharm, PharmD, B.Sc, B.FSc, and BVSc courses.

The TS EAMCET cutoff has been released for admission to Samskruti College of Engineering and Technology. Candidates can view or download the consolidated year-wise and round-wise TS EAMCET cutoff lists in the form of PDF from the table below for admission to the B.E. / B.Tech course.

Candidates can view the other specialisation options available for admission at multiple colleges accepting the TS EAMCET entrance exam. The comparison below is based on the last round cutoff rank of TS EAMCET for the General HS category students.

The Samskruti College of Engineering and Technology MBA cutoff 2025 for the General HS category in the last round was 20772. In contrast, the cutoff in 2024 was 26811, and the 2023 cutoff was 32837 for the aforementioned course and category. According to this data, we can say that the competition for MBA has been increasing in the last 3 years.

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied because of the facility's, unexperienced faculty and a below average.
reviews.review_text: Overall, the infrastructure is average and does not meet expectations. The college has labs, Wi-Fi, a canteen, medical facilities, and a large playground, including a basketball court. The quality of food in the college canteen is average and not top-notch.

reviews.review_heading: Events are not conducted.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are not bad, but we have quite poor Wi-Fi. Classrooms are good, and labs are well maintained. The food is super. They also provide snacks and tea when needed. They provide breakfast in the morning and meals in the afternoon for lunch, and the food is super good.

reviews.review_heading: Honest words about our college.
reviews.review_text: There are so many courses there is no mechanical branch available for the 2024. There is a library but only 1 for all blocks. Hostels are available for girls only. I'm not that much impressed by canteen and our college contains sports room with equipment and playground.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Facilities which are provided by the institute like Wi-Fi and labs are available in our college. Classrooms are more secured by the security camera. There is a library available in our college which contains many books of separate branch and gives a lot of information about the subjects.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure, etc.
reviews.review_text: The quality of the facilities in the hostel is good. Even food that is available in the mess is good. We even have medical and Wi-Fi facilities. There are rooms to stay in which are average. Classrooms contain projectors and facilities that make students understand the topics through situations faced in daily life.

reviews.review_heading: Excellent college (SMSK).
reviews.review_text: Very good facilities and infrastructure available in our course (mechanical) and also Wi-Fi, classrooms, and library are excellent. Hostel facilities are good and the quality of food is better and excellent in the canteen. Basic medical facilities are available. Every year, we have sports and games competitions.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college, try to join. You may get regret feeling but you won't dissatisfy.
reviews.review_text: I heard that in hostels, they provide food which is average, but the rooms and beds will be clean. Inside the college, there is a canteen and a sports room. In the sports room, indoor games are available. Labs are also available, and there is a library room. There is also a ground in the college to play cricket. Every year, they conduct sports like athletic sports, indoor games, and more.

reviews.review_heading: The entire rating of the college is 6 out of 10.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure, labs, and library are normal. The systems are not highly upgraded. The labs are just normal. Classrooms are also good but not to the point in which the engineering colleges should have. Don't expect modern infrastructure in this institution.

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied about Faculty.
reviews.review_text: In Samskruti College of Engineering And Technology, the people who want to stay at hostels, I prefer not to stay at college hostels. You can stay at nearby hostels which are better than our college hostels. And the food which they provide is also good.

reviews.review_heading: Honest review of our college SMSK.
reviews.review_text: Computer Science and technology department has good computer labs, and excellent library to study, and projectors in each and every classroom to understand concepts thoroughly. Talking about hostel, we have excellent rooms, with good furniture, and food is also good. You feel like you are eating at home. Wi-Fi connection is available for students in college and hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Great campus for those who are interested in Diploma.
reviews.review_text:
Here we have all the facilities, like computer labs and CAD labs, library, etc. Well-maintained and good infrastructure is there. The hostel food was very good and well maintained. All the food items are very tasty. Here we have a big canteen, sports club, play ground, etc. 
All are really worthy of us.

reviews.review_heading: It has good infrastructure and facilities, but the faculty is a bit disappointing.
reviews.review_text: We got facilities like sports every week, exercise, hackathons every year, a big library, 4 to 5 computer labs, more than 300 computer systems, separate classrooms for every section, a sports room with all indoor and outdoor gaming equipment, a canteen, hostel rooms with food, water, Wi-Fi, beds, and also medical support.

reviews.review_heading: It is best engineering college in jntu .
reviews.review_text: In this college tha infrastructure is good in classrooms, laboratories and libraries. Medical facilities are also available in the college in case of emergency. Hostel facility is also there for this college good atmosphere and well infrastructure for this college.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college that provides experienced faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Around 70% of students get placed. Our college will shape the students to build a good career and help them to get good job opportunities.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college with less fees and good quality.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. Classrooms are good. Library is recently updated with new edition books. Labs have outdated systems. Wi-Fi connection is available. College has a girls' hostel. Canteen has less variety of food items.

hostel_campus.college_name: Shri S’ad Vidya Mandal Institute Of Technology Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: I am surely satisfied because of the faculty members and events. The infrastructure is good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good. Laboratories of all branches are well-equipped. It has a hostel facility which is located very close to the college. It has a dedicated sports complex. Sports complex has various sports facilities like cricket, volleyball, badminton, and basketball.

reviews.review_heading: Take the admission only if you are a local of Bharuch.
reviews.review_text: Here, the best facility which I like personally is the life facility given by the campus. There are 4 labs on the campus. There is one library. All the classrooms have projector facilities so teachers can explain everything easily with the help of the projector.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty is good but they need to change the infrastructure and make some large events and some.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available in my course/department like (e.g. Wi-Fi, Labs, Classrooms, Library) the quality of the facilities in our hostel is not so good but it's okay. The quality of the facilities in your hostel is average, the quality of food available in the mess and canteen, medical facilities, sports and games are also average.

reviews.review_heading: My experience of SV MIT college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good. There are good and big classes. But the library there is not good. There is no Wi-Fi in the college, and I am a day scholar, so I don't know about the hostel there. The books in the library are good, but the infrastructure of the library is not good.

reviews.review_heading: Good faculty, but the infrastructure is just four walls and a rooftop.
reviews.review_text: The faculty members are all very supportive. In my computer science department, I have consulted my faculty multiple times, and it’s not always about academics; they're friendly enough to guide you in various situations. The classrooms are okay, with functional projectors, and the computer labs have internet access. The institute also provides a library with a fair number of books to cover our studies.

reviews.review_heading: Though our college has a small campus but it is worth it.
reviews.review_text: We have a Library building of 3 floors in which on the first floor they check our college ids and submit our backpacks over there. And on the second floor, we have lots of books related to engineering subjects; some are old and some are new. We don't have a hostel for boys in my college.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Shri S’ad Vidya Mandal Institute Of Technology.
reviews.review_text: The campus is not huge, but a multipurpose sports ground is present. Classrooms are well-equipped with Wi-Fi. The library is high-tech with ample books. There is no hostel facility on campus. A small canteen is present on campus for light refreshments.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college in Gujarat and has good facilities.
reviews.review_text: Our college's hostel is excellent. There are good rooms with beds and toilets. There is always a security guard. The mess is average and the canteen is below average. Our college has excellent medical facilities. There is a lot of chemical-related equipment in our college.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is a good place and provides good teaching.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is well-designed and rooms have good facilities for students. Our campus is good for sports. The food served is tasty. Our caretaker is very polite so students get satisfied.

reviews.review_heading: The CS And IT departments are famous in our college.
reviews.review_text: The studying environment is good in the college. The college has a sports hall in which they have a badminton hall, table tennis, and basketball grounds.

reviews.review_heading: This college is good for students in all aspects.
reviews.review_text: College provides a laboratory, library, and classrooms. The canteen was not available. For the sport available many grounds were large. The facilities provided for students were good.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and placement.
reviews.review_text:
Library offered by college was pretty good .
Computer rooms lab are provided with the latest course and programme.
Here library are also AC fully AC. 
You are provided with class with full modern technology smart classes.
Wi-Fi also provided here so that it will be easily learnable .

reviews.review_heading: I'm satisfied with the faculty members. There was good infrastructure in 2014 and good facilities.
reviews.review_text: Our college is built with good infrastructure. Our classrooms and labs are also designed well, and the canteen was appropriate. The library was good. The hostel facility was good as many of my friends who stayed there had a good experience. They said that the food served was also good, and the room condition was good.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has good management and provides disciplinary skills.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi facility is not available in this college. However, labs are good and clean, especially labs of computer, IT and chemical departments. The hostel is not good for students, and Wi-Fi is not available in the hostel. The hostel is not neat and clean, and there is no need for security. There are very congested beds.

reviews.review_heading: There are nice placements in our college.
reviews.review_text: There is a boys' hostel named Virtual Homes, which has an accommodating capacity of about 270 students along with a mess, telephones, inbuilt library and television facilities. Every room is 3 sharing based with attached bathroom, washbasin and mirror. There is a common room with television, magazines, newspapers and sports equipment. There are 24 hours of security and 24 hours of hot water.

overview_faqs.question: Why is Hirasugar Institute of Technology - HSIT so famous?
overview_faqs.answer: Hirasugar Institute of Technology (HSIT) is well-known for its focus on providing quality technical education to rural students in North Karnataka. The institute is accredited with an "A" grade by NAAC, and its programs in Computer Science, Electronics & Communication, Electrical, Mechanical, and Civil Engineering are NBA accredited. HSIT's infrastructure includes modern labs, a library, a hostel, and sports facilities, ensuring a well-rounded education for its students. The college is also involved in societal welfare, offering financial assistance to meritorious students, and supporting rural development through initiatives like the "Unnat Bharat Abhiyan"

admission_overview.title: Hirasugar Institute of Technology - HSIT Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description:
Hirasugar Institute of Technology - HSIT admission is entrance-based and merit-based. The college offers UG programme in the field of engineering. Hirasugar Institute of Technology - HSIT admission has variuous BTec specialisations such as Computer Science, Electronics and Communication, Electrical and Electronic and Mechanical Engineering. Students can also take lateral entry in the second year of Btech if they have pursued a one-year Diploma course.
Interested students can go through the following sections to know about the eligibility and admission process for Hirasugar Institute of Technology - HSIT.

eligibility_selection.title: Hirasugar Institute of Technology - HSIT Eligibility and Selection 2026
eligibility_selection.description: Hirasugar Institute of Technology - HSIT course admissions are given to eligible students. Students are offered seats based on preset admission criteria. The college selects students through entrance basis mainly. The college offers BE/BTech programme in full-time mode.Students should fulfil the eligibility to take admission in this college. The admissions are done as per regulations of Karnataka State givernment. Students have to submit KCET/COMEDK Main scores for final selection. The college also has seats reserved under the management quota. Students can check the table below to know about the eligibility and selection criteria for Hirasugar Institute of Technology - HSIT courses:

courses_table.eligibility: Class 12 with English as one of the Languages and obtained a minimum of 45% of marks in aggregate in Physics and Mathematics as compulsory subjects along with Chemistry / Bio-Technology/ Biology/ Electronics/ Computer Science. 40% aggregate score for SC/ST/OBC

A minimum of 40% aggregate score is required for SC/ST/OBC students.

admission_process.title: Hirasugar Institute of Technology - HSIT Admission Process 2026

paragraphs: Hirasugar Institute of Technology - HSIT admissionstart with an eligibility check. This is followed by other admission stages. These include application, selection, document submission, and admission confirmation. Students have to complete all the stages to get a seat. Interested students can check theHirasugar Institute of Technology - HSITadmission processgiven below:
Application Process 2026
Interested students can apply both online for Hirasugar Institute of Technology - HSIT programmes. Students have to submit the application form with documents + application fees.
Selection Process 2026
Students at Hirasugar Institute of Technology - HSIT are selected on an entrance basis. The college considers valid scores of KCET/KOMEDK exam to shortlist the students for BE/BTech exams.
The college reserves some of the seats under the state quota and management quota. candidates can check the seat allocation:
Admission Confirmation

Selected students have to report for verification of documents at the college. The list of documents is given at the official site. To complete the process, students have to pay theHirasugar Institute of Technology - HSIT admission fees.

Hirasugar Institute of Technology - HSIT total tuition fee is a sum of miultiple components. Students have to pay the course at the final step of admission to secure a seat. hostel_campus.college_name: Hirasugar Institute of Technology Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: Best college with discipline and good placements.
reviews.review_text: This college had A+ grade from NACC last year 2024. There are labs for each different course. College provides Wi-Fi access to all the students on the campus and students can showcase their talent.

reviews.review_heading: Good college with good education and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text:
Hostel facilities is good. Sports facilities should be improved. 
The mess food is good and hygienic. 
The canteen facility should be improved. 
The Wi-Fi and library facility is good.
Mess workers maintain regular hygiene .
Environment is friendly and fresh .

reviews.review_heading: Good college and totally satisfied with education and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text:
The infrastructure is pretty good and all the basic amenities are available. The food provided is hygienic and healthy, the mess is neat and clean and the workers maintain good hygiene. 
The food and other facilities is also good. Need to improve the sports and canteen facility .

reviews.review_heading: Our college has a good infrastructure and campus with good faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Hostel, library, and classrooms are well-equipped and are provided with good ventilation. There is a gym for boys and indoor games for all. Food provided is health-oriented. Mess is always found clean. Girls hostel has a clinic for health issues. Canteen is the area that needs to be improved with more items added.

reviews.review_heading: The campus is good and beautiful. It is worthy.
reviews.review_text: The campus is beautiful. Infrastructure is good. The campus is lush green. Wi-Fi facility is available. Classrooms are clean and good. The hostel is too nice. The food served in the mess is also good and hygienic. Canteen service is also good. Medicine facilities are also available. There is a separate gym. There is also an indoor stadium. The hall is available for practising extracurricular activities.

reviews.review_heading: Good for knowledge, bad at placement.
reviews.review_text: The campus is really good. The classes and labs are well-equipped. Clean and spacious. Indoor and out sports facility is really good. The food in the good, tasty, healthy. Spacious rooms with separate sections for each student. Best infrastructure and well spread campus and cool environment for study.

reviews.review_heading: It is a better college compared to other colleges. Placements are good.
reviews.review_text: HIT Nidsoshi campus is very beautiful and decent. All the facilities and comforts required for the students for their education and enjoyment are available. Classrooms are good. Overall, the infrastructure is quite good.

reviews.review_heading: The review of Hirasugar Institute of Technology.
reviews.review_text: We have a beautiful campus with good infrastructure. We have free Wi-Fi facility on the campus. The labs were equipped with good modern instruments. They provide good sportsmanship to the students. The food is good and usually cooked by steam cooking. We have smart classrooms. The canteen is also good and can be appreciated.

reviews.review_heading: I am happy with the college campus & faculty. And much satisfied with the exposures in sports.
reviews.review_text: Although our college is located in the rural area, it has all the facilities than urban area colleges has. The Wi-Fi facility with a speed 30Mbps. The labs are CAM, CAED software packages, CIM, HMT LAB, fluid mechanics&machines, energy engineering, Ic engine and testing, etc. Our college has a wide range of classrooms with each class having CCTV coverage and library with over 50000+ books collection. And there is the presence of emergency medical facility (24*7). And it got a very big playground...

reviews.review_heading: Everything good here, but don't go completely on it.
reviews.review_text: The college has the big and great infrastructure. The college has separate buildings for each department of engineering. It has vast garden providing full access all over the campus within the college premises. All the infrastructure is covered with Wi-Fi network. You will not get any such entertainment or time pass activities that you may be expecting. Other than that, it has the facilities like gym, 2 boys hostel, and 2 girls hostel, 1 canteen with well and hygiene food, and 3-4 parking.

reviews.review_heading: One of the best college for studying mechanical engineering till now I have seen.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of college is quite good. The holiness of the math makes it the best place to be there if you really want to be a studious person. The college is surrounded by the greenery of the trees and also located at a place where transportation facilities are at its best. When it comes to the classroom, it is digitised by using projectors in every class. Every student is given free access to Wi-Fi at low cost and service is 24*7. When it comes to the labs, I think this is the only colle...

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely satisfied because we can not see such supportive staff anywhere
reviews.review_text:
1. The college has a Wi-Fi connection with a good speed of 13 Mbps, which is provided for both the hostel and the college.
2. Separate rooms are available for the labs.
3. The classroom is provided with a blackboard and  projectors.
4. More than 5000 textbooks are available in the library.
5. There are separate buildings available for sports activities like table tennis, chess and carrom.
6. Separate clinics and medical facilities are provided by the college.
7. Good quality of labs and classroo...

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely, the college is good.
reviews.review_text:
The college offers good facilities and infrastructure. Our college has facilities like free Wi-Fi, Chemistry and Physics labs, good and clean classrooms and a well maintained library. All the facilities are available in the hostel. The food and medical facilities are good too.
.
