overview_faqs.question: Is K L E S`s K L E College of Engineering and Technology, Chikodi worth considering?
overview_faqs.answer: The flagship courses offered at K L E S`s K L E College of Engineering and Technology, Chikodi are B.Tech, MCA. The Institute has experienced faculty offering the best education to students. On the basis of Shiksha verified reviews, K L E S`s K L E College of Engineering and Technology, Chikodi has a rating of 4.8 by students. The college's campuslife, placements, faculty and Infrastructure has been rated as 4.5, 5, 5 and 5 as per reviews by students.

review_summary.college_name: K L E S`s K L E College of Engineering and Technology, Chikodi Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: I was satisfied by the college but coming to the placements it is not recommended.

content.Placements: For our batch, there are only 2 students who have been placed. The highest package was around 3.5 LPA. I feel bad about the placement because they used to bring a lot of training institutes to the college rather than IT companies. We had done our internship outside the college.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is pretty good. Particularly, the garden is mentioned as very clean and green. I love it the most. I was a day scholar, so I occasionally visited the hostel. The food was good here. Sports were conducted annually, and there were many games used to have a lot of fun at these events. There is also a cafe in the college.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electronics & Communication Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely dissatisfied with the placements.

content.Placements: I am a 2023 batch student. From our batch, only 10 percent of students got placed, which is very low in terms of placements. Only less than 10 good companies came for recruitment. The highest package offered was 5 LPA, and the lowest offered was 1.8 LPA. Top companies included Infosys, TCS, and Accenture.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure: * A very nice environment to study. * Good infrastructure. * An excellent library, good canteen, good classes, but the Wi-Fi is not good. * A good sports ground. The hostel is not bad, but the hostel Wi-Fi is not good, and wardens are sometimes very strict. * The food is not good.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: It's a good college with best faculty and good placements rate.

content.Placements: Our college is good at placements and our students got the best salary packages here and also placed in very good companies. We also have high-quality teaching and well-educated professors here at the KLE college. And we all, the students, enjoy learning here.
content.Infrastructure: In KLE College, we have good hostel facilities and infrastructure available for your course or department, including Wi-Fi, digital labs, standard classrooms and well-known library facilities. The quality of facilities in our hostel includes good food quality and hostel rooms for students.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: It gives best placements .

content.Placements: Iam blessed to have such kinda informative lecturers, and the management is so polite and support, Its like a second home to me which helped me to think in a practical manner I got many placements though, where it includes companies like Accenture etc.
content.Infrastructure: Well built structures, nice infrastructure, our class was having well built benches and the lightings and air conditioning is also there And the food in hostel is quite much good, but it can be more tasty if possible, and I got a good experience there .

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: It is a good college with good facilities.

content.Placements: Around 98% of students got placed in mechanical. The highest package is 2.5 LPA. Recruiting companies are Sigma Electric, Infosys, John Deere, CEAT, Infosys, and Tata. The top role offered on our campus is line operator for freshers. The present aggregate is a minimum of 62%.
content.Infrastructure: They provide almost everything on demand. Labs are highly technical, classrooms are neat and clean, maintenance is good, and Wi-Fi will be provided on demand.
content.Faculty: Teachers are cooperative, helpful, and good at teaching. Almost clear every doubt of students. They prepare us for good communication in English. It depends on students if they are studying then they will find everything easy.

review_summary.college_name: Malout Institute of Management and Information Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Average in faculty members and placements.

content.Placements: Placement is good at my college as students got placed in different companies. From B.Tech in computer science and engineering course, around 65%-70% of students got placed. The average salary package offered is about 5 LPA to 6 LPA. The lowest salary package is offered is around 3 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure for our computer science and engineering course is well- equipped with Wi-Fi, multiple computer labs, and smart classrooms that enhance the learning. The mess food is average, offering a mix of vegetarian and non-vegetarian meals.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: If you have financial problem or want a degree from Govt Engineering college, then come here.

content.Placements: 20% students got placed in campus placement. Most of the seniors are trying for off-campus placement. No big MNC companies come here. Companies like Infosys, TCS, and Infotech come here. Also, a huge number of students are trying to clear exams like GATE, CAT, and IELTS for higher studies. Recently, the highest package is 14 LPA and the lowest is 1.2 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: The labs are quite neat and clean. Also, the library is nice. We have plenty of books there. So we don't need to buy extra books. There is air conditioning in both labs and libraries .Class rooms are non-ac, but clean. Hostel life is total fun. No raging and drug culture here. The whole hostel is covered in WiFi. We get vegetarian foods here and the quality of the foods is also great.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Infrastructure and faculty are good.

content.Placements: There are average placement in this college. Mostly placement are in CSE. SD roles are offered in my course. 40% of students got internship. Wipro is the top recruiting company in my college. Almost students get placement in my college, there's good placement .
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are good. In labs every facility is available. Faculty members are very helpful, they will help you in every situation no matter what the situation is, they try their best to help you. Faculty have good knowledge they teach you well. Wi-Fi is also available in labs and other areas .

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Teachers are great. They are mostly qualified. Campus life is good.

content.Placements: 75% of the students were placed in my course. 2 LPA is the lowest, and 4 LPA is the average package offered in my course. Amazon, Wipro, etc. are recruiting companies for my course. 80–90% of students got internships from my course. Many top companies are coming to our college.
content.Infrastructure: The college ensures that every classroom is fine. Separate hostels for boys and girls. They provided single-seater, double-seater, and four-seater rooms. They have cooperated. The hostel staff is also good and supportive. Our college has a fully wi-fi campus.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Good infrastructure and facilities with average packages.

content.Placements: Placements are not that good at our college. Almost 30% of students got placed this year in my course. The highest package was 10 LPA, the medium was 4 LPA, and the lowest was around 1.5 LPA. Recruiting companies were Thinknext, Infotech, Infosys, etc., which provided mass recruitment. No on-campus internship is available here; students join different internships by searching off-campus. Many students sit for IELTS and move to foreign countries. A number of students went to Canada after taking this exam.
content.Infrastructure: I somehow like the infrastructure of this college; it's pretty good among the third-tier colleges. It has Wi-Fi in the library, labs and even the hostel. The IT department is so good here; we have a disciplined and supportive HOD who helps with our placements, internships and academics. I have to say the hostel and mess facilities are very good here. The quality of the food is superb and healthy but it is a bit oily. Medical facilities are also good; they will always be available in any emergency. Sports facilities are above average; anyone can play the games they like. We have a variety of game facilities here.

The institute offers UG courses for 3 years - 4 years. PG courses are offered for 2 years.
